001341:         economyMode: false,
001342:         tabletMode: 'auto',

001344:         shortcuts: true,

001397:     function normaliseLoadedState(parsed, base = defaultState()) {
001398:         const merged = {
001399:         ...base,
001400:         ...parsed,
001401:         nudge: { ...base.nudge, ...(parsed.nudge || {}) },
001402:         visibility: { ...base.visibility, ...(parsed.visibility || {}) },
001403:         quickPins: { ...base.quickPins, ...(parsed.quickPins || {}) },
001404:         coverage: { ...base.coverage, ...(parsed.coverage || {}) },
001405:         heatmap: { ...base.heatmap, ...(parsed.heatmap || {}) },
001406:         stuckDetector: { ...base.stuckDetector, ...(parsed.stuckDetector || {}) },
001407:         missionSpawn: { ...base.missionSpawn, ...(parsed.missionSpawn || {}) },
001408:         resourceGap: { ...base.resourceGap, ...(parsed.resourceGap || {}) },
001409:         transportSweep: { ...base.transportSweep, ...(parsed.transportSweep || {}) },
001410:         majorIncidentFeed: { ...base.majorIncidentFeed, ...(parsed.majorIncidentFeed || {}) },
001411:         missionAgeWatch: { ...base.missionAgeWatch, ...(parsed.missionAgeWatch || {}) },
001412:         payoutFlash: { ...base.payoutFlash, ...(parsed.payoutFlash || {}) },
001413:         discordReport: { ...base.discordReport, ...(parsed.discordReport || {}) },
001414:         financialVault: { ...base.financialVault, ...(parsed.financialVault || {}) },
001415:         autoNight: { ...base.autoNight, ...(parsed.autoNight || {}) },
001416:         profiles: Array.isArray(parsed.profiles) ? parsed.profiles.slice(0, MAP_PROFILE_LIMIT) : base.profiles,
001417:         bookmarks: Array.isArray(parsed.bookmarks) ? parsed.bookmarks.slice(0, 5) : base.bookmarks
001418:         };
001419: 
001420:         while (merged.bookmarks.length < 5) merged.bookmarks.push(null);
001421:         while (merged.profiles.length < MAP_PROFILE_LIMIT) merged.profiles.push(null);
001422: 
001423:         merged.uiTheme = normaliseUiTheme(merged.uiTheme);
001424:         merged.theme = normaliseTheme(merged.theme);
001425:         merged.position = POSITIONS[merged.position] ? merged.position : 'bl';
001426:         if (merged.activeTab === 'fleet') merged.activeTab = 'resources';
001427:         merged.activeTab = ['skins', 'tools', 'resources', 'ops', 'payouts', 'discord', 'places', 'settings'].includes(merged.activeTab) ? merged.activeTab : 'skins';
001428:         delete merged.fleetFilter;
001429:         merged.nudge.x = clamp(merged.nudge.x, -220, 220, 0);
001430:         merged.nudge.y = clamp(merged.nudge.y, -220, 220, 0);
001431:         merged.coverage.radiusMi = Number(merged.coverage.radiusMi) || 10;
001432:         merged.heatmap.radiusMi = Number(merged.heatmap.radiusMi) || 10;
001433:         merged.heatmap.opacity = clamp(merged.heatmap.opacity, 0.12, 0.55, 0.30);
001434:         merged.allianceCreditMinimum = [0, 5000, 10000, 15000, 20000].includes(Number(merged.allianceCreditMinimum)) ? Number(merged.allianceCreditMinimum) : 0;
001435:         merged.commandBarOpen = merged.commandBarOpen !== false;
001436:         merged.economyMode = Boolean(merged.economyMode);
001437:         merged.autoLoadAllVehicles = merged.autoLoadAllVehicles === true;
001438:         merged.allianceBuildingsMap = merged.allianceBuildingsMap !== false;
001439:         merged.majorIncidentFeed.enabled = merged.majorIncidentFeed.enabled !== false;
001440:         merged.majorIncidentFeed.minimumCredits = MAJOR_INCIDENT_FEED_MINIMUM_OPTIONS.includes(Number(merged.majorIncidentFeed.minimumCredits)) ? Number(merged.majorIncidentFeed.minimumCredits) : 25000;

001397:     function normaliseLoadedState(parsed, base = defaultState()) {
001398:         const merged = {
001399:         ...base,
001400:         ...parsed,
001401:         nudge: { ...base.nudge, ...(parsed.nudge || {}) },
001402:         visibility: { ...base.visibility, ...(parsed.visibility || {}) },
001403:         quickPins: { ...base.quickPins, ...(parsed.quickPins || {}) },
001404:         coverage: { ...base.coverage, ...(parsed.coverage || {}) },
001405:         heatmap: { ...base.heatmap, ...(parsed.heatmap || {}) },
001406:         stuckDetector: { ...base.stuckDetector, ...(parsed.stuckDetector || {}) },
001407:         missionSpawn: { ...base.missionSpawn, ...(parsed.missionSpawn || {}) },
001408:         resourceGap: { ...base.resourceGap, ...(parsed.resourceGap || {}) },
001409:         transportSweep: { ...base.transportSweep, ...(parsed.transportSweep || {}) },
001410:         majorIncidentFeed: { ...base.majorIncidentFeed, ...(parsed.majorIncidentFeed || {}) },
001411:         missionAgeWatch: { ...base.missionAgeWatch, ...(parsed.missionAgeWatch || {}) },
001412:         payoutFlash: { ...base.payoutFlash, ...(parsed.payoutFlash || {}) },
001413:         discordReport: { ...base.discordReport, ...(parsed.discordReport || {}) },
001414:         financialVault: { ...base.financialVault, ...(parsed.financialVault || {}) },
001415:         autoNight: { ...base.autoNight, ...(parsed.autoNight || {}) },
001416:         profiles: Array.isArray(parsed.profiles) ? parsed.profiles.slice(0, MAP_PROFILE_LIMIT) : base.profiles,
001417:         bookmarks: Array.isArray(parsed.bookmarks) ? parsed.bookmarks.slice(0, 5) : base.bookmarks
001418:         };
001419: 
001420:         while (merged.bookmarks.length < 5) merged.bookmarks.push(null);
001421:         while (merged.profiles.length < MAP_PROFILE_LIMIT) merged.profiles.push(null);
001422: 
001423:         merged.uiTheme = normaliseUiTheme(merged.uiTheme);
001424:         merged.theme = normaliseTheme(merged.theme);
001425:         merged.position = POSITIONS[merged.position] ? merged.position : 'bl';
001426:         if (merged.activeTab === 'fleet') merged.activeTab = 'resources';
001427:         merged.activeTab = ['skins', 'tools', 'resources', 'ops', 'payouts', 'discord', 'places', 'settings'].includes(merged.activeTab) ? merged.activeTab : 'skins';
001428:         delete merged.fleetFilter;

001430:         merged.nudge.y = clamp(merged.nudge.y, -220, 220, 0);
001431:         merged.coverage.radiusMi = Number(merged.coverage.radiusMi) || 10;
001432:         merged.heatmap.radiusMi = Number(merged.heatmap.radiusMi) || 10;
001433:         merged.heatmap.opacity = clamp(merged.heatmap.opacity, 0.12, 0.55, 0.30);

001442:         merged.missionAgeWatch.sortMode = CRITICAL_SORT_KEYS.includes(String(merged.missionAgeWatch.sortMode)) ? String(merged.missionAgeWatch.sortMode) : 'age';
001443:         merged.missionAgeWatch.expanded = Boolean(merged.missionAgeWatch.expanded);
001444:         merged.missionAgeWatch.ownershipFilter = CRITICAL_OWNERSHIP_FILTER_KEYS.includes(String(merged.missionAgeWatch.ownershipFilter)) ? String(merged.missionAgeWatch.ownershipFilter) : 'personal';
001445:         merged.missionAgeWatch.categoryFilter = CRITICAL_CATEGORY_FILTER_KEYS.includes(String(merged.missionAgeWatch.categoryFilter)) ? String(merged.missionAgeWatch.categoryFilter) : 'all';
001446:         merged.missionAgeWatch.primaryStatus = CRITICAL_PRIMARY_STATUS_KEYS.includes(String(merged.missionAgeWatch.primaryStatus)) ? String(merged.missionAgeWatch.primaryStatus) : 'all';
001447:         merged.missionAgeWatch.hasVehiclesOnWay = Boolean(merged.missionAgeWatch.hasVehiclesOnWay);
001448:         merged.missionAgeWatch.onlyMyUnits = Boolean(merged.missionAgeWatch.onlyMyUnits);
001449:         merged.missionAgeWatch.valueMode = CRITICAL_VALUE_MODE_KEYS.includes(String(merged.missionAgeWatch.valueMode)) ? String(merged.missionAgeWatch.valueMode) : 'total';
001450:         merged.missionAgeWatch.distanceOrigin = /^(?:live|locked|quick:[a-z0-9_-]+|bookmark:\d+)$/iu.test(String(merged.missionAgeWatch.distanceOrigin || '')) ? String(merged.missionAgeWatch.distanceOrigin) : 'live';
001451:         const lockedOrigin = merged.missionAgeWatch.lockedOrigin;
001452:         merged.missionAgeWatch.lockedOrigin = lockedOrigin && Number.isFinite(Number(lockedOrigin.lat)) && Number.isFinite(Number(lockedOrigin.lng))
001453:         ? { lat: Number(lockedOrigin.lat), lng: Number(lockedOrigin.lng), label: String(lockedOrigin.label || 'Locked centre').slice(0, 80) }
001454:         : null;
001455:         merged.missionLockAudio = merged.missionLockAudio !== false;
001456:         merged.missionValue = merged.missionValue !== false;
001457:         merged.missionRequirements = merged.missionRequirements !== false;
001458:         merged.tabletMode = ['auto', 'on', 'off'].includes(String(merged.tabletMode)) ? String(merged.tabletMode) : 'auto';
001459:         merged.mobileMode = ['auto', 'on', 'off'].includes(String(merged.mobileMode)) ? String(merged.mobileMode) : 'auto';
001460:         merged.transportWatcher = merged.transportWatcher !== false;
001461:         merged.missionInspector = merged.missionInspector !== false;
001462:         merged.stuckDetector.enabled = merged.stuckDetector.enabled !== false;
001463:         merged.stuckDetector.thresholdMin = Math.round(clamp(merged.stuckDetector.thresholdMin, STUCK_MIN_MINUTES, STUCK_MAX_MINUTES, 20));
001464:         merged.missionSpawn.enabled = merged.missionSpawn.enabled !== false;
001465:         merged.resourceGap.enabled = Boolean(merged.resourceGap.enabled);
001466:         merged.resourceGap.radiusMi = RESOURCE_GAP_RADIUS_OPTIONS.includes(Number(merged.resourceGap.radiusMi)) ? Number(merged.resourceGap.radiusMi) : 25;
001467:         merged.transportSweep.delayMs = TRANSPORT_SWEEP_DELAY_OPTIONS.includes(Number(merged.transportSweep.delayMs)) ? Number(merged.transportSweep.delayMs) : 2000;
001468:         merged.transportSweep.maxPerRun = Math.round(clamp(merged.transportSweep.maxPerRun, 1, TRANSPORT_SWEEP_MAX_REQUESTS, 25));
001469:         merged.payoutFlash.enabled = merged.payoutFlash.enabled !== false;
001470:         merged.payoutFlash.threshold = Math.round(clamp(merged.payoutFlash.threshold, 1000, 1000000000, 10000));
001471:         merged.payoutFlash.durationMs = normalisePayoutFlashDuration(merged.payoutFlash.durationMs);
001472:         merged.payoutFlash.template = PAYOUT_TEMPLATES[merged.payoutFlash.template] ? merged.payoutFlash.template : 'gta5';
001473:         merged.payoutFlash.soundEnabled = Boolean(merged.payoutFlash.soundEnabled);
001474:         merged.payoutFlash.soundVolume = clamp(merged.payoutFlash.soundVolume, 0, 1, 0.35);
001475:         merged.discordReport.webhookName = String(merged.discordReport.webhookName || 'MissionChief Finance').trim().slice(0, 80) || 'MissionChief Finance';
001476:         merged.discordReport.topCategories = [3, 5, 8].includes(Number(merged.discordReport.topCategories)) ? Number(merged.discordReport.topCategories) : 5;
001477:         merged.discordReport.period = ['today', 'yesterday', 'last24', 'last7', 'last30', 'last90', 'last180', 'last365', 'allAvailable', 'session', 'sinceLast', 'custom'].includes(merged.discordReport.period) ? merged.discordReport.period : 'today';
001478:         merged.discordReport.customStart = /^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/u.test(String(merged.discordReport.customStart || '')) ? String(merged.discordReport.customStart) : localIsoDate(new Date(Date.now() - 6 * 86400000));
001479:         merged.discordReport.customEnd = /^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/u.test(String(merged.discordReport.customEnd || '')) ? String(merged.discordReport.customEnd) : localIsoDate();
001480:         merged.discordReport.includeChart = merged.discordReport.includeChart !== false;
001481:         merged.discordReport.includeComparison = merged.discordReport.includeComparison !== false;
001482:         merged.discordReport.reportMode = ['executive', 'fullAudit'].includes(String(merged.discordReport.reportMode)) ? String(merged.discordReport.reportMode) : 'fullAudit';
001483:         merged.discordReport.includeForecast = merged.discordReport.includeForecast !== false;
--- source lines 30546-30720, match 30601 ---
030546:                 economyButton.title = label;
030547:                 economyButton.dataset.mcmsState = on ? 'on' : 'off';
030548:             }
030549:             const dockToggleButton = control.querySelector('.mcms-dock-toggle-btn');
030550:             if (dockToggleButton) {
030551:                 const open = state.commandBarOpen !== false;
030552:                 const label = open ? 'Collapse command bar' : 'Expand command bar';
030553:                 dockToggleButton.classList.toggle('mcms-open', open);
030554:                 dockToggleButton.setAttribute('aria-expanded', String(open));
030555:                 dockToggleButton.setAttribute('aria-label', label);
030556:                 dockToggleButton.title = label;
030557:                 const icon = dockToggleButton.querySelector('.mcms-dock-toggle-icon');
030558:                 if (icon) icon.textContent = open ? '▴' : '▾';
030559:             }
030560:         }
030561:         if (!panel) return;
030562:         refreshTabletModeUi(panel);
030563:         panel.querySelectorAll('.mcms-tab-btn').forEach(btn => {
030564:             const active = btn.dataset.tab === state.activeTab;
030565:             btn.classList.toggle('mcms-active', active);
030566:             btn.setAttribute('aria-selected', String(active));
030567:             btn.tabIndex = active ? 0 : -1;
030568:         });
030569:         panel.querySelectorAll('.mcms-tab-panel').forEach(tabPanel => {
030570:             const active = tabPanel.dataset.panel === state.activeTab;
030571:             tabPanel.classList.toggle('mcms-active', active);
030572:             tabPanel.hidden = !active;
030573:         });
030574:         const panelOpen = panel.classList.contains('mcms-open');
030575:         panel.setAttribute('aria-hidden', String(!panelOpen));
030576:         control?.querySelector('.mcms-menu-btn')?.setAttribute('aria-expanded', String(panelOpen));
030577:         panel.querySelectorAll('.mcms-ui-theme-btn').forEach(btn => {
030578:             const active = btn.dataset.uiTheme === state.uiTheme;
030579:             btn.classList.toggle('mcms-active', active);
030580:             btn.setAttribute('aria-pressed', String(active));
030581:         });
030582:         panel.querySelectorAll('.mcms-theme-btn').forEach(btn => btn.classList.toggle('mcms-active', btn.dataset.theme === state.theme));
030583:         panel.querySelectorAll('.mcms-position-btn').forEach(btn => btn.classList.toggle('mcms-active', btn.dataset.position === state.position));
030584:         const toggleValues = {
030585:             clean: state.cleanMode,
030586:             markerFocus: state.markerFocus,
030587:             missionPulse: state.missionPulse,
030588:             roadPriority: state.roadPriority,
030589:             coverage: state.coverage.enabled,
030590:             heatmap: state.heatmap.enabled,
030591:             shortcuts: state.shortcuts,

030593:             allianceBuildingsMapBlocker: state.allianceBuildingsMap === false,
030594:             majorIncidentFeed: state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled,
030595:             missionLockAudio: state.missionLockAudio,
030596:             autoNight: state.autoNight.enabled,
030597:             payoutFlash: state.payoutFlash.enabled,
030598:             payoutSound: state.payoutFlash.soundEnabled,
030599:             missionInspector: state.missionInspector,

030601:             missionRequirements: state.missionRequirements,

030603:             missionSpawn: state.missionSpawn.enabled,
030604:             resourceGap: state.resourceGap.enabled,
030605:             allianceMissions: state.visibility.allianceMissions,
030606:             myMissions: state.visibility.myMissions,
030607:             vehicles: state.visibility.vehicles,
030608:             buildings: state.visibility.buildings,

030613:             criticalView: criticalViewActive

030699: 
030700:     function ensureUi() {
030701:         const mapEl = getLargestLeafletMap();
030702:         if (settingsPanelActivated && !document.getElementById(SCRIPT.panelId)) createPanel();
030703:         if (mapEl) {
030704:             createControl(mapEl);
030705:             const map = findLeafletMapInstance(false);
030706:             if (state.economyMode && map) { applyLeafletEconomyPolicy(map); scheduleEconomyLayerSync(0); }
030707:             if (state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled && operationalStartupComplete) scheduleMajorIncidentFeedRender(0);
030708:             else if (!state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled) removeMajorIncidentFeed();
030709:             const payoutOverlay = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.payoutFlashId);
030710:             if (payoutOverlay?.classList.contains('mcms-payout-active')) positionPayoutFlashOverlay(payoutOverlay, mapEl);
030711:         }
030712:         return Boolean(mapEl && document.getElementById(SCRIPT.controlId));
030713:     }
030714: 
030715:     function mutationBelongsToToolkit(mutation) {
030716:         const target = mutation.target;
030717:         const toolkitTarget = Boolean(
030718:             target &&
030719:             target.nodeType === 1 &&
030720:             (

028927:                         item.style.setProperty('transition', `opacity ${duration}ms cubic-bezier(.2,.78,.22,1), transform ${duration}ms cubic-bezier(.2,.78,.22,1)`, 'important');
028928:                         item.style.setProperty('transition-delay', `${Math.min(index * stagger, 70)}ms`, 'important');
028929:                         item.style.setProperty('opacity', targetStyles[index].opacity, 'important');
028930:                         item.style.setProperty('transform', targetStyles[index].transform, 'important');
028931:                     });
028932:                 });
028933:                 commandBarAnimationTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
028934:                     commandBarAnimationTimer = null;
028935:                     clearAnimationStyles();
028936:                     commandBarAnimating = false;
028937:                 }, duration + maxDelay + 35);
028938:             }
028939:             showToast('Command bar expanded');
028940:             return;
028941:         }
028942:         if (duration <= 0 || !animatedItems.length) {
028943:             state.commandBarOpen = false;
028944:             saveState();
028945:             updateUI();
028946:             fitControlToMap();
028947:             showToast('Command bar collapsed');
028948:             return;
028949:         }
028950:         commandBarAnimating = true;
028951:         animatedItems.forEach((item, index) => {
028952:             const computed = pageWindow.getComputedStyle(item);
028953:             item.style.setProperty('transition', 'none', 'important');
028954:             item.style.setProperty('transition-delay', '0ms', 'important');
028955:             item.style.setProperty('opacity', computed.opacity || '1', 'important');
028956:             item.style.setProperty('transform', computed.transform === 'none' ? 'none' : computed.transform, 'important');
028957:             item.style.setProperty('will-change', 'opacity, transform', 'important');
028958:             item.dataset.mcmsCollapseDelay = String(Math.min(index * stagger, 70));
028959:         });
028960:         void control.offsetWidth;
028961:         runtimeRequestAnimationFrame(() => {
028962:             for (const item of animatedItems) {
028963:                 item.style.setProperty('transition', `opacity ${duration}ms cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1), transform ${duration}ms cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1)`, 'important');
028964:                 item.style.setProperty('transition-delay', `${item.dataset.mcmsCollapseDelay || 0}ms`, 'important');
028965:                 item.style.setProperty('opacity', '0', 'important');
028966:                 item.style.setProperty('transform', 'translateX(-10px) scale(.94)', 'important');
028967:                 delete item.dataset.mcmsCollapseDelay;
028968:             }
028969:         });
028970:         commandBarAnimationTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
028971:             commandBarAnimationTimer = null;
028972:             state.commandBarOpen = false;
028973:             saveState();
028974:             updateUI();
028975:             fitControlToMap();
028976:             clearAnimationStyles();
028977:             commandBarAnimating = false;
028978:         }, duration + maxDelay + 25);
028979:         showToast('Command bar collapsed');
028980:     }
028981: 
028982:     function toggleFeature(feature) {
028983:         if (feature === 'clean') state.cleanMode = !state.cleanMode;
028984:         if (feature === 'markerFocus') state.markerFocus = !state.markerFocus;
028985:         if (feature === 'missionPulse') state.missionPulse = !state.missionPulse;
028986:         if (feature === 'roadPriority') state.roadPriority = !state.roadPriority;
028987:         if (feature === 'coverage') state.coverage.enabled = !state.coverage.enabled;
028988:         if (feature === 'heatmap') state.heatmap.enabled = !state.heatmap.enabled;
028989:         if (feature === 'shortcuts') state.shortcuts = !state.shortcuts;
028990:         if (feature === 'autoLoadAllVehicles') {
028991:             state.autoLoadAllVehicles = !state.autoLoadAllVehicles;
028992:             if (state.autoLoadAllVehicles) installAutoLoadAllVehicles();
028993:             else stopAutoLoadAllVehicles();
028994:         }
028995:         if (feature === 'allianceBuildingsMapBlocker') state.allianceBuildingsMap = state.allianceBuildingsMap === false;
028996:         if (feature === 'majorIncidentFeed') state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled = !state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled;
028997:         if (feature === 'missionLockAudio') {
028998:             state.missionLockAudio = !state.missionLockAudio;
028999:             if (state.missionLockAudio) unlockPayoutAudio(true);
029000:         }
029001:         if (feature === 'allianceCredits') state.allianceCredits = !state.allianceCredits;
029002:         if (feature === 'missionAge') state.missionAge = !state.missionAge;
029003:         if (feature === 'unitCommitment') state.unitCommitment = !state.unitCommitment;
029004:         if (feature === 'transportWatcher') state.transportWatcher = !state.transportWatcher;
029005:         if (feature === 'missionInspector') state.missionInspector = !state.missionInspector;
029006:         if (feature === 'missionValue') state.missionValue = !state.missionValue;
029007:         if (feature === 'missionRequirements') state.missionRequirements = !state.missionRequirements;
029008:         if (feature === 'stuckDetector') state.stuckDetector.enabled = !state.stuckDetector.enabled;
029009:         if (feature === 'missionSpawn') state.missionSpawn.enabled = !state.missionSpawn.enabled;
029010:         if (feature === 'missionSpawn') {
029011:             missionSpawnArmed = false;
029012:             runtimeClearTimeout(missionSpawnPrimeTimer);
029013:             knownMissionIds.clear();
029014:             if (state.missionSpawn.enabled) primeMissionSpawnDetector();
029015:         }
029016:         if (feature === 'resourceGap') state.resourceGap.enabled = !state.resourceGap.enabled;
029017:         if (feature === 'criticalView') { toggleCriticalView(); return; }
029018:         if (feature === 'payoutFlash') state.payoutFlash.enabled = !state.payoutFlash.enabled;
029019:         if (feature === 'payoutSound') {
029020:             state.payoutFlash.soundEnabled = !state.payoutFlash.soundEnabled;
029021:             if (state.payoutFlash.soundEnabled) unlockPayoutAudio();
029022:             else disposePayoutMediaAudio();
029023:         }
029024:         if (feature === 'compactDock') state.compactDock = !state.compactDock;
029025:         if (feature === 'autoNight') {
029026:             state.autoNight.enabled = !state.autoNight.enabled;
029027:             state.autoNight.lastBucket = '';
029028:         }
029029:         if (feature === 'allianceMissions') state.visibility.allianceMissions = !state.visibility.allianceMissions;
029030:         if (feature === 'myMissions') state.visibility.myMissions = !state.visibility.myMissions;
029031:         if (feature === 'vehicles') state.visibility.vehicles = !state.visibility.vehicles;
029032:         if (feature === 'buildings') state.visibility.buildings = !state.visibility.buildings;
029033:         if (state.cleanMode) closePanel();
029034:         if (!criticalViewActive) saveState();
029035:         applyRootAttributes();
029036:         updateUI();
029037:         if (feature === 'vehicles') synchroniseVehicleMarkerClasses();
029038:         if (feature === 'buildings') synchronisePersonalBuildingVisibility();
029039:         if (state.economyMode && (feature === 'vehicles' || feature === 'buildings')) scheduleEconomyLayerSync(0);
029040:         reconcileFeatureRefreshes({ includeSnapshots: missionSnapshotsNeeded(), positionPanel: false });
029041:         if (feature === 'missionValue') {
029042:             if (state.missionValue) installMissionValueWindows();
029043:             else clearMissionValueIndicators();
029044:             showToast(state.missionValue ? 'Mission Value on' : 'Mission Value off');
029045:         }
029046:         if (feature === 'missionRequirements') {
029047:             if (state.missionRequirements) installMissionRequirementsWindows();
029048:             else clearMissionRequirementsPanels();
029049:             showToast(state.missionRequirements ? 'Mission Requirements on' : 'Mission Requirements off');
029050:         }
029051:         if (feature === 'autoLoadAllVehicles') showToast(state.autoLoadAllVehicles ? 'Auto-load all vehicles on' : 'Auto-load all vehicles off');
029052:         if (feature === 'allianceCredits') showToast(state.allianceCredits ? 'Alliance credits on' : 'Alliance credits off');
029053:         if (feature === 'missionAge') showToast(state.missionAge ? 'Personal mission age on' : 'Personal mission age off');
029054:         if (feature === 'unitCommitment') {
029055:             if (state.unitCommitment) {
029056:                 showToast('Loading unit assignments…');
029057:                 refreshPersonalVehicleData(true).then(ok => {
029058:                     scheduleUnitCommitmentRefresh(0);
029059:                     showToast(ok ? 'Unit Count on' : 'Unit Count on · live vehicle data unavailable');
029060:                 });
029061:             } else showToast('Unit Count off');
029062:         }
029063:         if (feature === 'transportWatcher') showToast(state.transportWatcher ? 'Transport Watcher on' : 'Transport Watcher off');
029064:         if (feature === 'majorIncidentFeed') {
029065:             if (state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled) {
029066:                 refreshMissionSnapshots();
029067:                 scheduleMajorIncidentFeedRender(0);
029068:             } else removeMajorIncidentFeed();
029069:             showToast(state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled ? 'Major Incident Feed on' : 'Major Incident Feed off');
029070:         }
029071:         if (feature === 'missionLockAudio') showToast(state.missionLockAudio ? 'Mission tracking audio on' : 'Mission tracking audio off');
029072:         if (feature === 'allianceBuildingsMapBlocker') {
029073:             if (state.allianceBuildingsMap === false) {
029074:                 installAllianceBuildingsEarlyStyle();
029075:                 installAllianceBuildingsLeafletAssignmentGuard();
029076:                 installAllianceBuildingsContextWatcherEarly();
029077:             } else {
029078:                 clearAllianceBuildingsEarlyContext();
029079:             }
029080:             showToast(state.allianceBuildingsMap === false ? 'Alliance Map Blocker ON · reloading' : 'Alliance Map Blocker OFF · reloading');
029081:             if (isAllianceBuildingsContext()) runtimeSetTimeout(() => location.reload(), 180);
029082:         }
029083:         if (feature === 'missionInspector') showToast(state.missionInspector ? 'Mission Inspector on' : 'Mission Inspector off');
029084:         if (feature === 'stuckDetector') showToast(state.stuckDetector.enabled ? `Stuck detector on · ${state.stuckDetector.thresholdMin} min` : 'Stuck detector off');
029085:         if (feature === 'missionSpawn') showToast(state.missionSpawn.enabled ? 'New mission animation on' : 'New mission animation off');
029086:         if (feature === 'resourceGap') {
029087:             if (state.resourceGap.enabled) refreshPersonalVehicleData(false).then(() => { scheduleResourceGapRefresh(0); refreshVisibleMissionInspector(); });
029088:             showToast(state.resourceGap.enabled ? `Resource Gap on · ${state.resourceGap.radiusMi}mi` : 'Resource Gap off');
029089:         }
029090:         if (feature === 'payoutSound') showToast(state.payoutFlash.soundEnabled ? 'Theme audio on · hosted MP3 cues load only when played' : 'Theme audio off');
029091:         if (feature === 'payoutFlash') showToast(state.payoutFlash.enabled ? 'Emergency payout flash on' : 'Emergency payout flash off');
029092:         if (feature === 'autoNight') runAutoNight(true);
029093:     }
029094: 
029095:     function runAutoNight(force = false) {
029096:         if (!state.autoNight.enabled) return;
029097:         const bucket = isNightNow(state.autoNight.nightStart, state.autoNight.dayStart) ? 'night' : 'day';
029098:         if (!force && state.autoNight.lastBucket === bucket) return;
029099:         state.autoNight.lastBucket = bucket;
029100:         state.theme = bucket === 'night' ? normaliseTheme(state.autoNight.nightTheme) : normaliseTheme(state.autoNight.dayTheme);
029101:         saveState();
===== 'const controlToggleValues =': 1 matches =====
--- source lines 30453-30627, match 30508 ---
030453:             state.payoutFlash.template = PAYOUT_TEMPLATES[target.value] ? target.value : 'gta5';
030454:             disposePayoutMediaAudio();
030455:             saveState();
030456:             updateUI();
030457:             const hostedCue = PAYOUT_MEDIA_SOUNDS[state.payoutFlash.template];
030458:             showToast(hostedCue
030459:                 ? `${payoutTemplateMeta(state.payoutFlash.template).label} · ${hostedCue.label} ready`
030460:                 : `${payoutTemplateMeta(state.payoutFlash.template).label} payout template`);
030461:             return;
030462:         }
030463:         if (setting === 'payout-threshold') {
030464:             state.payoutFlash.threshold = Math.round(clamp(target.value, 1000, 1000000000, 10000));
030465:             saveState();
030466:             updateUI();
030467:             showToast(`Payout flash: ${state.payoutFlash.threshold.toLocaleString()}+`);
030468:             return;
030469:         }
030470:         if (setting === 'payout-duration') {
030471:             state.payoutFlash.durationMs = normalisePayoutFlashDuration(Number(target.value) * 1000);
030472:             saveState();
030473:             updateUI();
030474:             showToast(`Payout flash: ${state.payoutFlash.durationMs / 1000} seconds`);
030475:             return;
030476:         }
030477:         if (setting === 'payout-volume') {
030478:             state.payoutFlash.soundVolume = clamp(target.value, 0, 1, 0.35);
030479:             if (payoutMediaAudio && !payoutMediaAudio.paused) payoutMediaAudio.volume = state.payoutFlash.soundVolume;
030480:             saveState();
030481:             updateUI();
030482:             return;
030483:         }
030484:         if (setting === 'payout-test-amount') return;
030485:         if (setting === 'auto-night-start') state.autoNight.nightStart = target.value || '19:00';
030486:         if (setting === 'auto-day-start') state.autoNight.dayStart = target.value || '07:00';
030487:         if (setting === 'auto-night-theme') state.autoNight.nightTheme = normaliseTheme(target.value);
030488:         if (setting === 'auto-day-theme') state.autoNight.dayTheme = normaliseTheme(target.value);
030489:         if (setting.startsWith('auto-')) {
030490:             state.autoNight.lastBucket = '';
030491:             saveState();
030492:             runAutoNight(true);
030493:             updateUI();
030494:         }
030495:     }
030496: 
030497:     function updateUI() {
030498:         applyRootAttributes();
030499:         if (state.missionRequirements) scheduleMissionRequirementsScan(0);
030500:         if (state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled && operationalStartupComplete) scheduleMajorIncidentFeedRender(40);
030501:         else if (!state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled) removeMajorIncidentFeed();
030502:         const control = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.controlId);
030503:         const panel = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.panelId);
030504:         if (control) {
030505:             for (const pos of Object.keys(POSITIONS)) control.classList.toggle(`mcms-pos-${pos}`, state.position === pos);
030506:             control.style.setProperty('--mcms-nudge-x', `${state.nudge.x}px`);
030507:             control.style.setProperty('--mcms-nudge-y', `${state.nudge.y}px`);
030508:             const controlToggleValues = {
030509:                 allianceMissions: state.visibility.allianceMissions,
030510:                 myMissions: state.visibility.myMissions,
030511:                 vehicles: state.visibility.vehicles,
030512:                 buildings: state.visibility.buildings,
030513:                 allianceCredits: state.allianceCredits,
030514:                 missionAge: state.missionAge,
030515:                 transportWatcher: state.transportWatcher,
030516:                 unitCommitment: state.unitCommitment,
030517:                 criticalView: criticalViewActive
030518:             };
030519:             control.querySelectorAll('[data-toggle]').forEach(btn => {
030520:                 const on = Boolean(controlToggleValues[btn.dataset.toggle]);
030521:                 btn.classList.toggle('mcms-on', on);
030522:                 btn.setAttribute('aria-pressed', String(on));
030523:                 btn.dataset.mcmsState = on ? 'on' : 'off';
030524:             });
030525:             const vehicleStatusButton = control.querySelector('[data-action="open-vehicle-status"]');
030526:             if (vehicleStatusButton) {
030527:                 const open = Boolean(document.getElementById(SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId)?.classList?.contains('mcms-open'));
030528:                 vehicleStatusButton.classList.toggle('mcms-on', open);
030529:                 vehicleStatusButton.setAttribute('aria-pressed', String(open));
030530:                 vehicleStatusButton.dataset.mcmsState = open ? 'on' : 'off';
030531:             }
030532:             const missionAgeWatchButton = control.querySelector('[data-action="open-critical-drawer"]');
030533:             if (missionAgeWatchButton) {
030534:                 const open = Boolean(document.getElementById(SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId)?.classList?.contains('mcms-open'));
030535:                 missionAgeWatchButton.classList.toggle('mcms-on', open);
030536:                 missionAgeWatchButton.setAttribute('aria-pressed', String(open));
030537:                 missionAgeWatchButton.dataset.mcmsState = open ? 'on' : 'off';
030538:             }
030539:             const economyButton = control.querySelector('.mcms-economy-btn');
030540:             if (economyButton) {
030541:                 const on = Boolean(state.economyMode);
030542:                 const label = on ? 'Disable Economy Mode' : 'Enable Economy Mode';
030543:                 economyButton.classList.toggle('mcms-on', on);
030544:                 economyButton.setAttribute('aria-pressed', String(on));
030545:                 economyButton.setAttribute('aria-label', label);
030546:                 economyButton.title = label;
030547:                 economyButton.dataset.mcmsState = on ? 'on' : 'off';
030548:             }
030549:             const dockToggleButton = control.querySelector('.mcms-dock-toggle-btn');
030550:             if (dockToggleButton) {
030551:                 const open = state.commandBarOpen !== false;
030552:                 const label = open ? 'Collapse command bar' : 'Expand command bar';
030553:                 dockToggleButton.classList.toggle('mcms-open', open);
030554:                 dockToggleButton.setAttribute('aria-expanded', String(open));
030555:                 dockToggleButton.setAttribute('aria-label', label);
030556:                 dockToggleButton.title = label;
030557:                 const icon = dockToggleButton.querySelector('.mcms-dock-toggle-icon');
030558:                 if (icon) icon.textContent = open ? '▴' : '▾';
030559:             }
030560:         }
030561:         if (!panel) return;
030562:         refreshTabletModeUi(panel);
030563:         panel.querySelectorAll('.mcms-tab-btn').forEach(btn => {
030564:             const active = btn.dataset.tab === state.activeTab;
030565:             btn.classList.toggle('mcms-active', active);
030566:             btn.setAttribute('aria-selected', String(active));
030567:             btn.tabIndex = active ? 0 : -1;
030568:         });
030569:         panel.querySelectorAll('.mcms-tab-panel').forEach(tabPanel => {
030570:             const active = tabPanel.dataset.panel === state.activeTab;
030571:             tabPanel.classList.toggle('mcms-active', active);
030572:             tabPanel.hidden = !active;
030573:         });
030574:         const panelOpen = panel.classList.contains('mcms-open');
030575:         panel.setAttribute('aria-hidden', String(!panelOpen));
030576:         control?.querySelector('.mcms-menu-btn')?.setAttribute('aria-expanded', String(panelOpen));
030577:         panel.querySelectorAll('.mcms-ui-theme-btn').forEach(btn => {
030578:             const active = btn.dataset.uiTheme === state.uiTheme;
030579:             btn.classList.toggle('mcms-active', active);
030580:             btn.setAttribute('aria-pressed', String(active));
030581:         });
030582:         panel.querySelectorAll('.mcms-theme-btn').forEach(btn => btn.classList.toggle('mcms-active', btn.dataset.theme === state.theme));
030583:         panel.querySelectorAll('.mcms-position-btn').forEach(btn => btn.classList.toggle('mcms-active', btn.dataset.position === state.position));
030584:         const toggleValues = {
030585:             clean: state.cleanMode,
030586:             markerFocus: state.markerFocus,
030587:             missionPulse: state.missionPulse,
030588:             roadPriority: state.roadPriority,
030589:             coverage: state.coverage.enabled,
030590:             heatmap: state.heatmap.enabled,
030591:             shortcuts: state.shortcuts,
030592:             autoLoadAllVehicles: state.autoLoadAllVehicles,
030593:             allianceBuildingsMapBlocker: state.allianceBuildingsMap === false,
030594:             majorIncidentFeed: state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled,
030595:             missionLockAudio: state.missionLockAudio,
030596:             autoNight: state.autoNight.enabled,
030597:             payoutFlash: state.payoutFlash.enabled,
030598:             payoutSound: state.payoutFlash.soundEnabled,
030599:             missionInspector: state.missionInspector,
030600:             missionValue: state.missionValue,
030601:             missionRequirements: state.missionRequirements,
030602:             stuckDetector: state.stuckDetector.enabled,
030603:             missionSpawn: state.missionSpawn.enabled,
030604:             resourceGap: state.resourceGap.enabled,
030605:             allianceMissions: state.visibility.allianceMissions,
030606:             myMissions: state.visibility.myMissions,
030607:             vehicles: state.visibility.vehicles,
030608:             buildings: state.visibility.buildings,
030609:             allianceCredits: state.allianceCredits,
030610:             missionAge: state.missionAge,
030611:             transportWatcher: state.transportWatcher,
030612:             unitCommitment: state.unitCommitment,
030613:             criticalView: criticalViewActive
030614:         };
030615:         panel.querySelectorAll('[data-toggle]').forEach(btn => {
030616:             const key = btn.dataset.toggle;
030617:             const on = Boolean(toggleValues[key]);
030618:             btn.classList.toggle('mcms-on', on);
030619:             const pill = btn.querySelector('.mcms-pill');
030620:             if (pill) pill.textContent = key === 'coverage' ? (on ? `${state.coverage.radiusMi}mi` : 'OFF') : key === 'heatmap' ? (on ? `${state.heatmap.radiusMi}mi` : 'OFF') : (on ? 'ON' : 'OFF');
030621:         });

030623:         if (majorIncidentMinimum) majorIncidentMinimum.value = String(state.majorIncidentFeed.minimumCredits);
030624:         const radius = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="coverage-radius"]');
030625:         if (radius) radius.value = String(state.coverage.radiusMi);
030626:         const heatmapSource = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="heatmap-source"]');
030627:         if (heatmapSource) heatmapSource.value = state.heatmap.source;

030699: 
030700:     function ensureUi() {
030701:         const mapEl = getLargestLeafletMap();
030702:         if (settingsPanelActivated && !document.getElementById(SCRIPT.panelId)) createPanel();
030703:         if (mapEl) {
===== 'installMissionRequirementsWindows();': 2 matches =====
--- source lines 28992-29166, match 29047 ---
028992:             if (state.autoLoadAllVehicles) installAutoLoadAllVehicles();
028993:             else stopAutoLoadAllVehicles();
028994:         }
028995:         if (feature === 'allianceBuildingsMapBlocker') state.allianceBuildingsMap = state.allianceBuildingsMap === false;
028996:         if (feature === 'majorIncidentFeed') state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled = !state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled;
028997:         if (feature === 'missionLockAudio') {
028998:             state.missionLockAudio = !state.missionLockAudio;
028999:             if (state.missionLockAudio) unlockPayoutAudio(true);
029000:         }
029001:         if (feature === 'allianceCredits') state.allianceCredits = !state.allianceCredits;
029002:         if (feature === 'missionAge') state.missionAge = !state.missionAge;
029003:         if (feature === 'unitCommitment') state.unitCommitment = !state.unitCommitment;
029004:         if (feature === 'transportWatcher') state.transportWatcher = !state.transportWatcher;
029005:         if (feature === 'missionInspector') state.missionInspector = !state.missionInspector;
029006:         if (feature === 'missionValue') state.missionValue = !state.missionValue;
029007:         if (feature === 'missionRequirements') state.missionRequirements = !state.missionRequirements;
029008:         if (feature === 'stuckDetector') state.stuckDetector.enabled = !state.stuckDetector.enabled;
029009:         if (feature === 'missionSpawn') state.missionSpawn.enabled = !state.missionSpawn.enabled;
029010:         if (feature === 'missionSpawn') {
029011:             missionSpawnArmed = false;
029012:             runtimeClearTimeout(missionSpawnPrimeTimer);
029013:             knownMissionIds.clear();
029014:             if (state.missionSpawn.enabled) primeMissionSpawnDetector();
029015:         }
029016:         if (feature === 'resourceGap') state.resourceGap.enabled = !state.resourceGap.enabled;
029017:         if (feature === 'criticalView') { toggleCriticalView(); return; }
029018:         if (feature === 'payoutFlash') state.payoutFlash.enabled = !state.payoutFlash.enabled;
029019:         if (feature === 'payoutSound') {
029020:             state.payoutFlash.soundEnabled = !state.payoutFlash.soundEnabled;
029021:             if (state.payoutFlash.soundEnabled) unlockPayoutAudio();
029022:             else disposePayoutMediaAudio();
029023:         }
029024:         if (feature === 'compactDock') state.compactDock = !state.compactDock;
029025:         if (feature === 'autoNight') {
029026:             state.autoNight.enabled = !state.autoNight.enabled;
029027:             state.autoNight.lastBucket = '';
029028:         }
029029:         if (feature === 'allianceMissions') state.visibility.allianceMissions = !state.visibility.allianceMissions;
029030:         if (feature === 'myMissions') state.visibility.myMissions = !state.visibility.myMissions;
029031:         if (feature === 'vehicles') state.visibility.vehicles = !state.visibility.vehicles;
029032:         if (feature === 'buildings') state.visibility.buildings = !state.visibility.buildings;
029033:         if (state.cleanMode) closePanel();
029034:         if (!criticalViewActive) saveState();
029035:         applyRootAttributes();
029036:         updateUI();
029037:         if (feature === 'vehicles') synchroniseVehicleMarkerClasses();
029038:         if (feature === 'buildings') synchronisePersonalBuildingVisibility();
029039:         if (state.economyMode && (feature === 'vehicles' || feature === 'buildings')) scheduleEconomyLayerSync(0);
029040:         reconcileFeatureRefreshes({ includeSnapshots: missionSnapshotsNeeded(), positionPanel: false });
029041:         if (feature === 'missionValue') {
029042:             if (state.missionValue) installMissionValueWindows();
029043:             else clearMissionValueIndicators();
029044:             showToast(state.missionValue ? 'Mission Value on' : 'Mission Value off');
029045:         }
029046:         if (feature === 'missionRequirements') {
029047:             if (state.missionRequirements) installMissionRequirementsWindows();
029048:             else clearMissionRequirementsPanels();
029049:             showToast(state.missionRequirements ? 'Mission Requirements on' : 'Mission Requirements off');
029050:         }
029051:         if (feature === 'autoLoadAllVehicles') showToast(state.autoLoadAllVehicles ? 'Auto-load all vehicles on' : 'Auto-load all vehicles off');
029052:         if (feature === 'allianceCredits') showToast(state.allianceCredits ? 'Alliance credits on' : 'Alliance credits off');
029053:         if (feature === 'missionAge') showToast(state.missionAge ? 'Personal mission age on' : 'Personal mission age off');
029054:         if (feature === 'unitCommitment') {
029055:             if (state.unitCommitment) {
029056:                 showToast('Loading unit assignments…');
029057:                 refreshPersonalVehicleData(true).then(ok => {
029058:                     scheduleUnitCommitmentRefresh(0);
029059:                     showToast(ok ? 'Unit Count on' : 'Unit Count on · live vehicle data unavailable');
029060:                 });
029061:             } else showToast('Unit Count off');
029062:         }
029063:         if (feature === 'transportWatcher') showToast(state.transportWatcher ? 'Transport Watcher on' : 'Transport Watcher off');
029064:         if (feature === 'majorIncidentFeed') {
029065:             if (state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled) {
029066:                 refreshMissionSnapshots();
029067:                 scheduleMajorIncidentFeedRender(0);
029068:             } else removeMajorIncidentFeed();
029069:             showToast(state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled ? 'Major Incident Feed on' : 'Major Incident Feed off');
029070:         }
029071:         if (feature === 'missionLockAudio') showToast(state.missionLockAudio ? 'Mission tracking audio on' : 'Mission tracking audio off');
029072:         if (feature === 'allianceBuildingsMapBlocker') {
029073:             if (state.allianceBuildingsMap === false) {
029074:                 installAllianceBuildingsEarlyStyle();
029075:                 installAllianceBuildingsLeafletAssignmentGuard();
029076:                 installAllianceBuildingsContextWatcherEarly();
029077:             } else {
029078:                 clearAllianceBuildingsEarlyContext();
029079:             }
029080:             showToast(state.allianceBuildingsMap === false ? 'Alliance Map Blocker ON · reloading' : 'Alliance Map Blocker OFF · reloading');
029081:             if (isAllianceBuildingsContext()) runtimeSetTimeout(() => location.reload(), 180);
029082:         }
029083:         if (feature === 'missionInspector') showToast(state.missionInspector ? 'Mission Inspector on' : 'Mission Inspector off');
029084:         if (feature === 'stuckDetector') showToast(state.stuckDetector.enabled ? `Stuck detector on · ${state.stuckDetector.thresholdMin} min` : 'Stuck detector off');
029085:         if (feature === 'missionSpawn') showToast(state.missionSpawn.enabled ? 'New mission animation on' : 'New mission animation off');
029086:         if (feature === 'resourceGap') {
029087:             if (state.resourceGap.enabled) refreshPersonalVehicleData(false).then(() => { scheduleResourceGapRefresh(0); refreshVisibleMissionInspector(); });
029088:             showToast(state.resourceGap.enabled ? `Resource Gap on · ${state.resourceGap.radiusMi}mi` : 'Resource Gap off');
029089:         }
029090:         if (feature === 'payoutSound') showToast(state.payoutFlash.soundEnabled ? 'Theme audio on · hosted MP3 cues load only when played' : 'Theme audio off');
029091:         if (feature === 'payoutFlash') showToast(state.payoutFlash.enabled ? 'Emergency payout flash on' : 'Emergency payout flash off');
029092:         if (feature === 'autoNight') runAutoNight(true);
029093:     }
029094: 
029095:     function runAutoNight(force = false) {
029096:         if (!state.autoNight.enabled) return;
029097:         const bucket = isNightNow(state.autoNight.nightStart, state.autoNight.dayStart) ? 'night' : 'day';
029098:         if (!force && state.autoNight.lastBucket === bucket) return;
029099:         state.autoNight.lastBucket = bucket;
029100:         state.theme = bucket === 'night' ? normaliseTheme(state.autoNight.nightTheme) : normaliseTheme(state.autoNight.dayTheme);
029101:         saveState();
029102:         applyRootAttributes();
029103:         updateUI();
029104:     }
029105: 
029106:     function isNightNow(start, end) {
029107:         const now = new Date();
029108:         const current = now.getHours() * 60 + now.getMinutes();
029109:         const startMin = parseTime(start, 19 * 60);
029110:         const endMin = parseTime(end, 7 * 60);
029111:         if (startMin === endMin) return false;
029112:         if (startMin < endMin) return current >= startMin && current < endMin;
029113:         return current >= startMin || current < endMin;
029114:     }
029115: 
029116:     function parseTime(value, fallback) {
029117:         const match = String(value || '').match(/^(\d{1,2}):(\d{2})$/);
029118:         if (!match) return fallback;
029119:         return clamp(match[1], 0, 23, Math.floor(fallback / 60)) * 60 + clamp(match[2], 0, 59, fallback % 60);
029120:     }
029121: 
029122:     function shouldSuppressControl() {
029123:         if (state.cleanMode) return false;
029124:         if (document.body && document.body.classList.contains('modal-open')) return true;
029125:         return SUPPRESSION_SELECTORS.some(selector => {
029126:             let nodes;
029127:             try { nodes = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(selector)); } catch (err) { return false; }
029128:             return nodes.some(el => {
029129:                 if (!el || el.closest(`#${SCRIPT.controlId}`) || el.closest(`#${SCRIPT.panelId}`)) return false;
029130:                 if (!isVisible(el)) return false;
029131:                 const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
029132:                 return (rect.width * rect.height) > 1200;
029133:             });
029134:         });
029135:     }
029136: 
029137:     function refreshSuppression() {
029138:         const control = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.controlId);
029139:         if (!control) return;
029140:         control.classList.toggle('mcms-hidden-by-menu', shouldSuppressControl());
029141:     }
029142:

029147:             const mapEl = getLargestLeafletMap();
029148:             if (!mapEl) {
029149:                 if (!isTouchLayoutActive()) {
029150:                     observeDesktopPanelWorkspace(null);
029151:                     applyDesktopPanelSizing(panel, null);
029152:                 }
029153:                 return;
029154:             }
029155:             if (mobileModeActive) {
029156:                 clearDesktopPanelSizing(panel);
029157:                 applyMobileDockLayout(mapEl);
029158:             } else if (tabletModeActive) {
029159:                 clearDesktopPanelSizing(panel);
029160:                 applyTabletDockLayout(mapEl);
029161:             } else {
029162:                 clearTabletDockSizing();
029163:                 observeDesktopPanelWorkspace(mapEl);
029164:                 applyDesktopPanelSizing(panel, mapEl);
029165:             }
029166:             if (!panel) return;

031301:     function startBootAttemptCoordinator(bootPerformanceStartedAt) {
031302:         let attempts = 0;
031303:         const runBootAttempt = () => {
031304:             attempts += 1;
031305:             installMissionMarkerAddHook();
031306:             installRadioMessageHook();
031307:             installCreditsUpdateHook();
031308:             observeCreditValue();
031309:             const ready = ensureUi();
031310:             const mapReady = Boolean(getLargestLeafletMap());
031311:             if (ready && (mapReady || attempts >= 12)) {
031312:                 recordStartupMetric('coreUiReadyMs', bootPerformanceStartedAt, { bootAttempts: attempts });
031313:                 scheduleMarkerStateSync(0, false);
031314:                 scheduleDeferredOperationalStartup();
031315:                 runtimeSetTimeout(() => runtimeRunWhenIdle(connectMainMutationObserver, STARTUP_OBSERVER_DELAY_MS), STARTUP_OBSERVER_DELAY_MS);
031316:                 return;
031317:             }
031318:             if (attempts >= 90 || runtime.destroyed) return;
031319:             const delay = attempts < 12 ? 350 : attempts < 30 ? 700 : 1400;
031320:             runtimeSetTimeout(runBootAttempt, delay);
031321:         };
031322:         runtimeSetTimeout(runBootAttempt, 250);
031323:     }
031324: 
031325:     function boot() {
031326:         if (runtime.destroyed || bootStarted) return;
031327:         bootStarted = true;
031328:         bootStartedAt = Date.now();
031329:         const bootPerformanceStartedAt = startupClock();
031330:         applyRootAttributes();
031331:         if (installAllianceBuildingsPageOptimisation()) return;
031332:         createCleanExit();
031333:         if (state.autoLoadAllVehicles) installAutoLoadAllVehicles();
031334:         installMissionMarkerAddHook();
031335:         installRadioMessageHook();
031336:         lastObservedCredits = readCurrentCreditTotal();
031337:         installCreditsUpdateHook();
031338:         observeCreditValue();
031339:         installMissionRequirementsWindows();
031340:         startBootAttemptCoordinator(bootPerformanceStartedAt);
031341:         const observer = runtimeTrackObserver(new MutationObserver(mutations => {
031342:             if (state.economyMode && economyMapMoving) {
031343:                 economyDeferredDomMutation = true;
031344:                 return;
031345:             }
031346:             let externalMutationFound = false;
031347:             let addedLeafletMarker = false;
031348:             let missionChanged = false;
031349:             let layoutChanged = false;
031350:             let toolkitUiRemoved = false;
031351:             for (const mutation of mutations) {
031352:                 if (mutationBelongsToToolkit(mutation)) continue;
031353:                 externalMutationFound = true;
031354:                 if (!addedLeafletMarker && mutationAddsLeafletMarkerIcon(mutation)) {
031355:                     addedLeafletMarker = true;
031356:                     missionChanged = true;
031357:                 }
031358:                 if (!missionChanged && mutationAffectsMissionData(mutation)) missionChanged = true;
031359:                 if (!layoutChanged && mutationAffectsMapLayout(mutation)) layoutChanged = true;
031360:                 if (!toolkitUiRemoved && mutationRemovesToolkitUi(mutation)) toolkitUiRemoved = true;
031361:                 if (addedLeafletMarker && missionChanged && layoutChanged && toolkitUiRemoved) break;
031362:             }
031363:             if (!externalMutationFound) return;
031364:             missionChanged ||= addedLeafletMarker;
031365:             if (!missionChanged && !layoutChanged && !toolkitUiRemoved) return;
031366:             if (addedLeafletMarker) {
031367:                 invalidateMarkerRegistryCaches('all');
031368:                 scheduleMarkerStateSync(0, false);
031369:                 if (!state.visibility.buildings) scheduleMarkerStateSync(180, true);
031370:             }
031371:             if (layoutChanged) invalidateMapElementCache();
031372:             if (document.hidden || dragState || (state.economyMode && economyMapMoving)) return;
031373:             runtimeClearTimeout(mutationTimer);
031374:             const startupSettling = bootStartedAt > 0 && Date.now() - bootStartedAt < STARTUP_SETTLE_WINDOW_MS;
031375:             const mutationDelay = startupSettling
031376:                 ? STARTUP_MUTATION_DEBOUNCE_MS
031377:                 : (state.economyMode ? Math.max(320, DOM_REFRESH_DEBOUNCE_MS) : DOM_REFRESH_DEBOUNCE_MS);
031378:             mutationTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
031379:                 if (dragState || document.hidden || runtime.destroyed || (state.economyMode && economyMapMoving)) return;
031380:                 const panelMissing = settingsPanelActivated && !document.getElementById(SCRIPT.panelId);
031381:                 const mapElement = getLargestLeafletMap();
031382:                 const controlMissing = Boolean(mapElement && !document.getElementById(SCRIPT.controlId));
031383:                 if (toolkitUiRemoved || panelMissing || controlMissing) ensureUi();

031386:                 }

031389:                     fitControlToMap();

031392:                 }

031395:                     scheduleMissionRequirementsScan(35);
031396:                 }
031397:             }, mutationDelay);
031398:         }));
031399:         mainMutationObserver = observer;

031416:             if (control && control.contains(event.target)) return;

015599:         if (missionId === null) continue;
015600:

015602:             const ownerId = vehicleOwnerId(vehicle);
015603:             if (currentUserId !== null && ownerId !== null && ownerId !== currentUserId) continue;
015604:         }
015605:

015607:         if (seenVehicles.has(vehicleId)) continue;
015608:         seenVehicles.add(vehicleId);

015610:         let commitment = missionCommitmentIndex.get(missionId);
015611:         if (!commitment) {
015612:             commitment = {
015613:                 total: 0,
015614:                 active: 0,
015615:                 onScene: 0,
015616:                 onWay: 0,
015617:                 travelling: 0,
015618:                 transporting: 0,
015619:                 awaitingPickup: 0,
015620:                 requestingDispatch: 0,
015621:                 outOfService: 0,
015622:                 available: 0,
015623:                 unknownStatus: 0
015624:             };
015625:             missionCommitmentIndex.set(missionId, commitment);
015626:         }
015627: 
015628:         commitment.total += 1;
015629:         const code = vehicleStatusCode(vehicle);
015630:         if (code === 3) {
015631:             commitment.onWay += 1;
015632:             commitment.travelling += 1;
015633:             commitment.active += 1;
015634:         } else if (code === 4) {
015635:             commitment.onScene += 1;
015636:             commitment.active += 1;
015637:         } else if (code === 7) {
015638:             commitment.transporting += 1;
015639:             commitment.active += 1;
015640:         } else if (code === 9) {
015641:             commitment.awaitingPickup += 1;
015642:             commitment.active += 1;
015643:         } else if (code === 5) commitment.requestingDispatch += 1;
015644:         else if (code === 6) commitment.outOfService += 1;
015645:         else if (code === 1 || code === 2) commitment.available += 1;
015646:         else commitment.unknownStatus += 1;
015647:         }
015648: 
015649:         missionCommitmentIndexDirty = false;
015650:         return missionCommitmentIndex;
015651:     }

015653:     function refreshPersonalVehicleData(force = false) {
015654:         const now = Date.now();
015655:         if (vehicleApiFetchPromise) return vehicleApiFetchPromise;
015656:         if (!force && vehicleApiLastError && now - vehicleApiLastError < VEHICLE_API_ERROR_BACKOFF_MS) return Promise.resolve(false);
015657:         if (!force && vehicleApiReady && now - vehicleApiLastFetch < VEHICLE_API_MIN_REFRESH_MS) return Promise.resolve(true);
015658: 
015659:         vehicleApiFetchPromise = runtimeFetch(new URL('/api/vehicles', document.baseURI || pageWindow.location.href), {
015660:         credentials: 'same-origin',
015661:         cache: 'no-store',
015662:         headers: { Accept: 'application/json' }
015663:         })
015664:         .then(response => {
015665:             if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`Vehicle API ${response.status}`);
015666:             return response.json();
015667:         })
015668:         .then(payload => {
015669:             const records = normaliseVehicleApiPayload(payload);
015670:             const next = new Map();
015671:             for (const vehicle of records) {
015672:                 const id = vehicleRecordId(vehicle);
015673:                 if (id !== null) next.set(id, vehicle);
015674:             }
015675:             personalVehicleApiCache.clear();
015676:             for (const [id, vehicle] of next) personalVehicleApiCache.set(id, vehicle);
015677:             vehicleApiReady = true;
015678:             vehicleApiLastFetch = Date.now();
015679:             vehicleStatusLastUpdate = vehicleApiLastFetch;
015680:             vehicleApiLastError = 0;
015681:             vehicleDataRevision += 1;
015682:             invalidateMarkerRegistryCaches('vehicle');
015683:             invalidateMissionCommitmentIndex();
015684:             rebuildMissionCommitmentIndex();
015685:             resourceGapAnalysisCache.clear();
015686:             resourceGapVehicleContextCache.key = '';
015687:             if (!startupDataPassActive) {
015688:                 if (state.unitCommitment) scheduleUnitCommitmentRefresh(280);
015689:                 scheduleMissionSnapshotRefresh(650);
015690:                 if (state.resourceGap.enabled) scheduleResourceGapRefresh(520);
015691:                 if (operationalUiIsVisible()) scheduleOperationalPanelsRender(750);
015692:                 if (criticalViewActive) runtimeSetTimeout(() => { applyCriticalViewFilter(); fitCriticalMissions(); }, 320);
015693:             }
015694:             return true;
015695:         })
015696:         .catch(() => {
015697:             vehicleApiLastError = Date.now();
015698:             return false;
015699:         })
015700:         .finally(() => { vehicleApiFetchPromise = null; });
015701: 
015702:         return vehicleApiFetchPromise;
015703:     }
015704: 
015705:     function captureRadioVehicleMessage(message) {
015706:         if (!message || typeof message !== 'object' || message.type !== 'vehicle_fms') return;
015707:         const currentUserId = currentMissionUserId();
015708:         if (currentUserId !== null && message.user_id !== undefined && String(message.user_id) !== currentUserId) return;
015709:         const id = vehicleRecordId(message);
015710:         if (id === null) return;
015711: 
015712:         const existing = personalVehicleApiCache.get(id) || {};
015713:         const targetType = Number(message.target_building_id) > 0 ? 'building' : Number(message.mission_id) > 0 ? 'mission' : null;
015714:         const targetId = targetType === 'building' ? message.target_building_id : targetType === 'mission' ? message.mission_id : null;
015715:         personalVehicleApiCache.set(id, {
015716:         ...existing,
015717:         id: Number.isFinite(Number(message.id)) ? Number(message.id) : message.id,
015718:         caption: message.caption ?? existing.caption,
015719:         fms_real: Number.isFinite(Number(message.fms_real)) ? Number(message.fms_real) : existing.fms_real,
015720:         fms_show: Number.isFinite(Number(message.fms)) ? Number(message.fms) : existing.fms_show,
015721:         target_type: targetType,
015722:         target_id: targetId
015723:         });
015724:         vehicleDataRevision += 1;
015725:         vehicleStatusLastUpdate = Date.now();
015726:         invalidateMarkerRegistryCaches('vehicle');
015727:         invalidateMissionCommitmentIndex();
015728:         resourceGapAnalysisCache.clear();
015729:         resourceGapVehicleContextCache.key = '';
015730:         if (state.unitCommitment) scheduleUnitCommitmentRefresh(500);
015731:         scheduleMissionSnapshotRefresh(850);
015732:         if (state.resourceGap.enabled) scheduleResourceGapRefresh(900);
015733:         if (operationalUiIsVisible()) scheduleOperationalPanelsRender(1000);
015734:     }
015735: 
015736:     function installRadioMessageHook() {
015737:         let current;
015738:         try { current = pageWindow.radioMessage; } catch (err) { return false; }
015739:         if (typeof current !== 'function') return false;
015740:         if (current.__mcmsVehicleDataWrappedV313) return true;
015741: 
015742:         const original = current.__mcmsOriginal || current;
015743:         const wrapped = function (...args) {
015744:         for (const arg of args) captureRadioVehicleMessage(arg);
015745:         return original.apply(this, args);
015746:         };
015747:         try {
015748:         Object.defineProperty(wrapped, '__mcmsVehicleDataWrappedV313', { value: true });
015749:         Object.defineProperty(wrapped, '__mcmsOriginal', { value: original });
015750:         pageWindow.radioMessage = wrapped;
015751:         if (pageWindow.radioMessage !== wrapped) return false;
015752:         runtime.hookRestorers.push(() => {
015753:             try {
015754:                 if (pageWindow.radioMessage === wrapped) pageWindow.radioMessage = original;
015755:             } catch (err) {}
015756:         });
015757:         return true;
015758:         } catch (err) {
015759:         return false;
015760:         }
015761:     }
015762: 
015763:     function missionPersonalUnitState(marker, missionId) {
015764:         const commitment = personalUnitCommitmentForMission(missionId);
015765:         if (commitment.total > 0) return { hasUnit: true, known: true, commitment };
015766:         if (commitment.known) return { hasUnit: false, known: true, commitment };
015767: 
015768:         const markerState = missionVehicleStateFromObject(marker);
015769:         if (markerState !== null) return { hasUnit: markerState > 0, known: true, commitment };
015770: 
015771:         const cached = missionOverlayData.get(missionId);
015772:         if (Number.isFinite(Number(cached?.vehicleState))) {
--- source lines 16084-16258, match 16139 ---
016084:         if (age >= CRITICAL_VIEW_MIN_AGE_MS) return { rank: 1, label: '8H+ AGED', className: 'mcms-age-aged' };
016085:         return { rank: 0, label: 'RECENT', className: 'mcms-age-recent' };
016086:     }
016087: 
016088:     function missionKnownPersonal(marker, missionId) {
016089:         const id = normaliseMissionId(missionId);
016090:         if (!marker || id === null) return false;
016091:         if (isPersonalMissionLayer(marker, id)) return true;
016092:         const overlay = missionOverlayData.get(id);
016093:         const currentUserId = currentUserIdCached();
016094:         if (currentUserId !== null && overlay?.userId !== undefined && String(overlay.userId) === currentUserId) return true;
016095:         if (liveMissionSnapshots.get(id)?.source === 'personal') return true;
016096:         return false;
016097:     }
016098: 
016099:     function personalMissionAgeRecord(marker, missionId, now = Date.now()) {
016100:         if (!marker || missionId === null || !missionKnownPersonal(marker, missionId)) return null;
016101:         const createdAt = getMissionCreatedAt(marker, missionId);
016102:         if (createdAt === null) return null;
016103:         const ageMs = Math.max(0, now - createdAt);
016104:         return { createdAt, ageMs, severity: missionAgeSeverity(ageMs) };
016105:     }
016106: 
016107:     function clearUnitCommitmentLabels() {
016108:         if (unitCommitmentGroup) {
016109:         try { unitCommitmentGroup.clearLayers(); unitCommitmentGroup.remove(); } catch (err) {}
016110:         }
016111:         unitCommitmentLabels.clear();
016112:         unitCommitmentGroup = null;
016113:     }
016114: 
016115:     function unitCommitmentAnchor(marker, missionId) {
016116:         const personal = isPersonalMissionLayer(marker, missionId);
016117:         let rowsAbove = 0;
016118:         if (personal) {
016119:         if (state.missionAge) rowsAbove += 1;
016120:         } else if (state.allianceCredits) rowsAbove += 1;
016121:         return 18 + (rowsAbove * 20);
016122:     }
016123: 
016124:     function makeUnitCommitmentIcon(commitment, personal, anchor) {
016125:         const text = commitment.onScene && commitment.travelling
016126:         ? `${commitment.onScene}✓ ${commitment.travelling}→`
016127:         : commitment.onScene ? `${commitment.onScene}✓` : commitment.travelling ? `${commitment.travelling}→` : `U ${commitment.total}`;
016128:         return pageWindow.L.divIcon({
016129:         className: 'mcms-unit-commitment-icon',
016130:         html: `<span class="mcms-unit-commitment-badge ${personal ? 'mcms-unit-personal' : 'mcms-unit-alliance'}">${escapeHtml(text)}</span>`,
016131:         iconSize: [0, 0], iconAnchor: [0, anchor]
016132:         });
016133:     }
016134: 
016135:     function updateUnitCommitmentLabels() {
016136:         if (state.economyMode && economyMapMoving) return;
016137:         if (!state.unitCommitment) { clearUnitCommitmentLabels(); return; }
016138:         const vehicleDataFreshnessMs = state.economyMode ? 5 * 60 * 1000 : VEHICLE_API_REFRESH_MS;
016139:         if (!vehicleApiReady || Date.now() - vehicleApiLastFetch >= vehicleDataFreshnessMs) refreshPersonalVehicleData(false);
016140:         const map = findLeafletMapInstance(false);
016141:         if (!map || !pageWindow.L || typeof pageWindow.L.layerGroup !== 'function' || typeof pageWindow.L.marker !== 'function' || typeof pageWindow.L.divIcon !== 'function') {
016142:         clearUnitCommitmentLabels(); return;
016143:         }
016144:         const floatPane = ensureMissionFloatPane(map);
016145:         if (!floatPane) { clearUnitCommitmentLabels(); return; }
016146:         const economyBounds = state.economyMode ? economyPaddedBounds(map, 0.08) : null;
016147:         try {
016148:         if (!unitCommitmentGroup || unitCommitmentGroup._map !== map) {
016149:             clearUnitCommitmentLabels();
016150:             unitCommitmentGroup = pageWindow.L.layerGroup();
016151:             unitCommitmentGroup.__mcmsUnitCommitmentLayer = true;
016152:             unitCommitmentGroup.addTo(map);
016153:         }
016154:         const activeIds = new Set();
016155:         for (const marker of getMissionMarkerIndex().markers) {
016156:             const missionId = normaliseMissionId(marker?.mission_id ?? marker?.missionId ?? marker?.options?.mission_id ?? marker?.options?.missionId);
016157:             if (missionId === null) continue;
016158:             const personal = isPersonalMissionLayer(marker, missionId);
016159:             if (personal && !state.visibility.myMissions) continue;
016160:             if (!personal && !state.visibility.allianceMissions) continue;
016161:             if (criticalViewActive && personal) {
016162:                 const ageRecord = personalMissionAgeRecord(marker, missionId);
016163:                 if (!ageRecord || ageRecord.ageMs < CRITICAL_VIEW_MIN_AGE_MS) continue;
016164:             }
016165:             const commitment = personalUnitCommitmentForMission(missionId);
016166:             if (commitment.total <= 0) continue;
016167:             let latLng = null;
016168:             try { latLng = marker.getLatLng?.() || null; } catch (err) {}
016169:             if (!latLng || (economyBounds && !economyBounds.contains?.(latLng))) continue;
016170:             const anchor = unitCommitmentAnchor(marker, missionId);
016171:             const signature = `${commitment.total}:${commitment.onScene}:${commitment.travelling}:${personal}:${anchor}`;
016172:             activeIds.add(missionId);
016173:             let label = unitCommitmentLabels.get(missionId);
016174:             if (!label) {
016175:                 label = pageWindow.L.marker(latLng, { interactive:false, keyboard:false, bubblingMouseEvents:false, pane:floatPane, zIndexOffset:0, icon:makeUnitCommitmentIcon(commitment, personal, anchor) });
016176:                 label.__mcmsUnitCommitmentSignature = signature;
016177:                 label.__mcmsUnitCommitmentLabel = true;
016178:                 label.addTo(unitCommitmentGroup);
016179:                 unitCommitmentLabels.set(missionId, label);
016180:             } else {
016181:                 try { label.setLatLng(latLng); } catch (err) {}
016182:                 if (label.__mcmsUnitCommitmentSignature !== signature) {
016183:                     label.__mcmsUnitCommitmentSignature = signature;
016184:                     try { label.setIcon(makeUnitCommitmentIcon(commitment, personal, anchor)); } catch (err) {}
016185:                 }
016186:             }
016187:         }
016188:         for (const [missionId, label] of unitCommitmentLabels.entries()) {
016189:             if (activeIds.has(missionId)) continue;
016190:             unitCommitmentLabels.delete(missionId);
016191:             try { unitCommitmentGroup.removeLayer(label); } catch (err) {}
016192:         }
016193:         } catch (err) { clearUnitCommitmentLabels(); }
016194:     }
016195: 
016196:     function scheduleUnitCommitmentRefresh(delay = 400) {
016197:         runtimeClearTimeout(unitCommitmentTimer);
016198:         unitCommitmentTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(updateUnitCommitmentLabels, state.economyMode ? Math.max(900, delay) : delay);
016199:     }
016200: 
016201: 
016202:     function clearTransportWatcherLabels() {
016203:         if (transportWatcherGroup) {
016204:         try { transportWatcherGroup.clearLayers(); transportWatcherGroup.remove(); } catch (err) {}
016205:         }
016206:         transportWatcherLabels.clear();
016207:         transportWatcherGroup = null;
016208:     }
016209: 
016210:     function transportRequirementFromSnapshot(snapshot) {
016211:         const raw = normaliseMissingRequirementText(snapshot?.missingText);
016212:         if (!raw) return null;
016213:         const text = raw.toLowerCase();
016214:         const transportRequired = [
016215:         /\btransport(?:ation)?\b.{0,34}\b(?:needed|required|waiting|pending)\b/i,
016216:         /\b(?:needs?|requires?|awaiting)\b.{0,34}\btransport(?:ation)?\b/i,
016217:         /\bmust be transported\b/i,
016218:         /\btransport is needed\b/i,
016219:         /\b(?:transport|abtransport|gefangenentransport)\b.{0,34}\b(?:erforderlich|ben[oö]tigt|notwendig)\b/i,
016220:         /\b(?:muss|müssen)\b.{0,34}\btransportiert werden\b/i,
016221:         /\b(?:transport|vervoer)\b.{0,34}\b(?:nodig|vereist)\b/i,
016222:             /\b(?:moet|moeten)\b.{0,34}\b(?:vervoerd|afgevoerd)\b/i
016223:         ].some(pattern => pattern.test(text));
016224:         if (!transportRequired) return null;
016225: 
016226:         const prisonerTerms = /prison|prisoner|custod|detainee|arrest|cell|jail|gefangen|haft|arrestant|gevangen/i;
016227:         const patientTerms = /patient|hospital|ambulance|medical|casualt|injur|verletz|krankenhaus|ziekenhuis|gewond/i;
016228:         const patients = Number(snapshot?.patientsCount) || 0;
016229:         const prisoners = Number(snapshot?.prisonersCount) || 0;
016230:         let type = 'general';
016231:         if (prisonerTerms.test(text) || (prisoners > 0 && patients <= 0)) type = 'prisoner';
016232:         else if (patientTerms.test(text) || (patients > 0 && prisoners <= 0)) type = 'patient';
016233: 
016234:         const explicitCount = raw.match(/\b(\d{1,2})\b/);
016235:         let count = explicitCount ? Number(explicitCount[1]) : 0;
016236:         if (!count && type === 'patient' && patients > 1) count = patients;
016237:         if (!count && type === 'prisoner' && prisoners > 1) count = prisoners;
016238:         count = Math.min(99, Math.max(0, Math.round(count || 0)));
016239: 
016240:         return {
016241:         type,
016242:         count,
016243:         label: type === 'patient' ? 'Patient transport required' : type === 'prisoner' ? 'Prisoner transport required' : 'Transport required'
016244:         };
016245:     }
016246: 
016247:     function transportWatcherSvg(type) {
016248:         if (type === 'prisoner') {
016249:         return `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M3.5 8.5h12.2l3.1 3.3v5.1H3.5z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M15.7 8.5v3.3h3.1M7 11.2v3.2M10 11.2v3.2M13 11.2v3.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.55" stroke-linecap="round"/><circle cx="7.1" cy="18" r="1.7" fill="#171008" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3"/><circle cx="16.4" cy="18" r="1.7" fill="#171008" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3"/></svg>`;
016250:         }
016251:         if (type === 'patient') {
016252:         return `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M3.5 8.5h11.8l3.7 3.5v4.9H3.5z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M15.3 8.5V12H19M8.3 10.2v4.3M6.15 12.35h4.3" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.65" stroke-linecap="round"/><circle cx="7.1" cy="18" r="1.7" fill="#171008" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3"/><circle cx="16.4" cy="18" r="1.7" fill="#171008" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3"/></svg>`;
016253:         }
016254:         return `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M2.8 8.8h11.9l3.7 3.4v4.7H2.8z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M14.7 8.8v3.4h3.7M7.4 12.7h5.1M10.8 10.8l2 1.9-2 1.9" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.55" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><circle cx="6.5" cy="18" r="1.7" fill="#171008" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3"/><circle cx="15.8" cy="18" r="1.7" fill="#171008" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3"/></svg>`;
016255:     }

016258:         try {

017384:                     }, 5000, 140);
017385:                     if (!cleared) throw new Error('Discharge confirmation timed out');

017390:                 } catch (err) {

017392:                     transportSweepLog(`Failed ${candidate.label}: ${err?.message || 'unknown error'}`, 'error');
017393:                 }
017394:             }

017398:                 transportSweepLog(`Returning to ${item.caption} for remaining alliance ambulances`);
017399:                 missionOpen = await openTransportSweepPath(`/missions/${missionId}`, 'mission');
017400:                 if (!missionOpen) {
017401:                     transportSweepRuntime.errors += 1;
017402:                     transportSweepLog(`Could not return to ${item.caption} during fallback processing`, 'error');
017403:                     break;
017404:                 }
017405:             }
017406:         }
017407: 
017408:         await closeTransportSweepWindows('finishing the mission');
017409:
