017411:             transportSweepRuntime.skipped += 1;
017412:             renderTransportSweepPanel();
017413:         }
017414:         return clearedHere;
017415:     }
017416: 
017417:     async function startTransportSweep() {
017418:         if (transportSweepRuntime.running) return;
017419:         const queue = buildTransportSweepQueue();
017420:         if (!queue.length) {
017421:             showToast('No alliance patient transports found');
017422:             return;
017423:         }
017424:         showToast('Verifying your personal vehicle list…');
017425:         const ownershipReady = await refreshPersonalVehicleData(true);
017426:         if (!ownershipReady || !vehicleApiReady || personalVehicleApiCache.size === 0) {
017427:             showToast('Transport Sweep cancelled — your vehicle ownership list could not be verified');
017428:             return;
017429:         }
017430:         transportSweepRuntime.ownVehicleIds = new Set(Array.from(personalVehicleApiCache.keys(), id => String(id)));
017431:         const totalRequests = queue.reduce((sum, item) => sum + Math.max(1, Number(item.count) || 1), 0);
017432:         const planned = Math.min(totalRequests, state.transportSweep.maxPerRun);
017433:         const confirmed = pageWindow.confirm(`Transport Sweep will attempt up to ${planned} alliance-member patient releases across ${queue.length} alliance mission${queue.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}.
017434: 
017435: The sweep waits dynamically for LSSM's “Release patient (No reward)” controls and processes one alliance ambulance at a time. Your own verified vehicle IDs are always excluded. If LSSM controls do not appear, the existing vehicle-window route remains available as a fallback. Continue?`);
017436:         if (!confirmed) return;
017437:         transportSweepRuntime.running = true;
017438:         transportSweepRuntime.stopRequested = false;
017439:         transportSweepRuntime.currentMissionId = null;
017440:         transportSweepRuntime.currentVehicleHref = '';
017441:         transportSweepRuntime.cleared = 0;
017442:         transportSweepRuntime.skipped = 0;
017443:         transportSweepRuntime.errors = 0;
017444:         transportSweepRuntime.processed = 0;
017445:         transportSweepRuntime.rejectedOwn = 0;
017446:         transportSweepRuntime.missionAnchorBaseline = new Set();
017447:         transportSweepRuntime.vehicleButtonBaseline = new Set();
017448:         transportSweepRuntime.missionWindowRoot = null;
017449:         transportSweepRuntime.activeWindowRoot = null;
017450:         transportSweepRuntime.ownedWindowLayers = new Set();
017451:         transportSweepRuntime.activeWindowCreatedLayer = false;
017452:         transportSweepRuntime.lastCandidateStats = null;
017453:         runtimeClearTimeout(transportSweepRuntime.hudDismissTimer);
017454:         transportSweepRuntime.hudDismissTimer = null;
017455:         transportSweepRuntime.startedAt = Date.now();
017456:         transportSweepRuntime.missionIndex = 0;
017457:         transportSweepRuntime.missionTotal = queue.length;
017458:         transportSweepRuntime.currentItem = 'Preparing sweep';
017459:         transportSweepRuntime.statusMessage = 'Preparing patient transport sweep';
017460:         transportSweepRuntime.statusLevel = 'info';
017461:         transportSweepRuntime.hudFinal = false;
017462:         transportSweepRuntime.log = [];
017463:         renderTransportSweepPanel();
017464:         transportSweepLog(`Sweep started: ${queue.length} missions, maximum ${state.transportSweep.maxPerRun} requests`);
017465:         try {
017466:             for (let missionOffset = 0; missionOffset < queue.length; missionOffset += 1) {
017467:                 const item = queue[missionOffset];
017468:                 if (transportSweepRuntime.stopRequested || transportSweepRuntime.cleared >= state.transportSweep.maxPerRun) break;
017469:                 transportSweepRuntime.missionIndex = missionOffset + 1;
017470:                 transportSweepRuntime.currentItem = String(item?.caption || `Mission ${item?.missionId || missionOffset + 1}`);
017471:                 renderTransportSweepPanel();
017472:                 const remaining = state.transportSweep.maxPerRun - transportSweepRuntime.cleared;
017473:                 await processTransportSweepMission(item, remaining);
017474:                 if (!transportSweepRuntime.stopRequested) await transportSweepSleep(state.transportSweep.delayMs);
017475:             }
017476:         } catch (err) {
017477:             transportSweepRuntime.errors += 1;
017478:             transportSweepLog(`Sweep stopped by error: ${err?.message || 'unknown error'}`, 'error');
017479:         } finally {
017480:             await closeTransportSweepWindows('finishing the sweep');
017481:             const wasStopped = transportSweepRuntime.stopRequested;
017482:             transportSweepRuntime.running = false;
017483:             transportSweepRuntime.stopRequested = false;
017484:             transportSweepRuntime.currentMissionId = null;
017485:             transportSweepRuntime.currentVehicleHref = '';
017486:             transportSweepRuntime.currentItem = '';
017487:             transportSweepRuntime.missionAnchorBaseline = new Set();
017488:             transportSweepRuntime.vehicleButtonBaseline = new Set();
017489:             transportSweepRuntime.activeWindowRoot = null;
017490:             transportSweepRuntime.ownedWindowLayers = new Set();
017491:             transportSweepRuntime.activeWindowCreatedLayer = false;
017492:             transportSweepRuntime.hudFinal = true;
017493:             buildTransportSweepQueue();
017494:             scheduleTransportWatcherRefresh(0);
017495:             showToast(wasStopped ? `Transport Sweep stopped · ${transportSweepRuntime.cleared} cleared` : `Transport Sweep complete · ${transportSweepRuntime.cleared} cleared`);
017496:             transportSweepLog(`${wasStopped ? 'Stopped' : 'Complete'}: ${transportSweepRuntime.cleared} cleared, ${transportSweepRuntime.skipped} skipped, ${transportSweepRuntime.errors} errors`, transportSweepRuntime.errors ? 'error' : 'info');
017497:             scheduleTransportSweepHudDismiss(6500);
017498:         }
017499:     }
017500: 
017501:     function stopTransportSweep() {
017502:         if (!transportSweepRuntime.running) return;
017503:         transportSweepRuntime.stopRequested = true;
017504:         transportSweepLog('Stop requested — finishing the current action');
017505:         renderTransportSweepPanel();
017506:     }
017507: 
017508:     function vehicleTargetInfo(vehicle) {
017509:         if (!vehicle || typeof vehicle !== 'object') return { type: null, id: null };
017510:         const containers = [vehicle, vehicle.options, vehicle.params, vehicle.vehicle, vehicle.data, vehicle.vehicleData, vehicle._vehicleData]
017511:             .filter(item => item && typeof item === 'object');
017512:         for (const item of containers) {
017513:             const type = String(item.target_type ?? item.targetType ?? '').toLowerCase();
017514:             const id = normaliseMissionId(item.target_id ?? item.targetId);
017515:             if ((type === 'mission' || type === 'building') && id !== null && id !== '0') return { type, id };
017516:             const missionId = normaliseMissionId(item.mission_id ?? item.missionId);
017517:             if (missionId !== null && missionId !== '0') return { type: 'mission', id: missionId };
017518:             const buildingId = normaliseMissionId(item.target_building_id ?? item.targetBuildingId);
017519:             if (buildingId !== null && buildingId !== '0') return { type: 'building', id: buildingId };
017520:         }
017521:         return { type: null, id: null };
017522:     }
017523: 
017524:     function vehicleSearchSignal(vehicle) {
017525:         if (!vehicle || typeof vehicle !== 'object') return '';
017526:         const containers = [vehicle, vehicle.options, vehicle.params, vehicle.vehicle, vehicle.data, vehicle.vehicleData, vehicle._vehicleData]
017527:             .filter(item => item && typeof item === 'object');
017528:         const values = [];
017529:         for (const item of containers) {
017530:             values.push(item.caption, item.name, item.vehicle_type_caption, item.vehicleTypeCaption, item.vehicle_type_name, item.vehicleTypeName, item.type_caption, item.typeCaption, item.title);
017531:         }
017532:         try { values.push(vehicle?._icon?.title, vehicle?._icon?.alt, vehicle?._icon?.getAttribute?.('aria-label')); } catch (err) {}
017533:         return values.filter(Boolean).join(' ');
017534:     }
017535: 
017536:     function vehicleStatusBucket(vehicle) {
017537:         const status = vehicleStatusCode(vehicle);
017538:         if ([1, 2].includes(status)) return 'available';
017539:         if (status === 3) return 'travelling';
017540:         if (status === 4) return 'scene';
017541:         if ([7, 8].includes(status)) return 'transport';
017542:         return 'other';
017543:     }
017544:

020580:             </div>
020581:             <div class="mcms-vcs-table-body" data-vcs-body></div>
020582:             <div class="mcms-vcs-table-row mcms-vcs-total-row" role="row">
020583:                 <strong role="cell">Total</strong>
020584:                 <span role="cell">Personal fleet</span>
020585:                 <strong role="cell" data-vcs-total>0</strong>
020586:             </div>
020587:         </div>
020588:         <div class="mcms-vcs-footnote">Codes are read from MissionChief's live <code>fms_real</code> vehicle status. Zero-count codes remain visible so out-of-service units are never hidden.</div>`;

020591:             event.stopPropagation();
020592:             if (closestEventTarget(event, '.mcms-vcs-close')) {
020593:                 closeVehicleCodeStatus();
020594:                 return;
020595:             }
020596:             if (closestEventTarget(event, '.mcms-vcs-refresh')) refreshVehicleCodeStatus(true);
020597:         });
020598:         ['dblclick', 'mousedown', 'mouseup', 'mousemove', 'wheel', 'contextmenu', 'touchstart', 'touchmove', 'touchend'].forEach(eventName => {
020599:             drawer.addEventListener(eventName, event => event.stopPropagation(), { passive: false });
020600:         });
020601:         document.body.appendChild(drawer);
020602:         return drawer;
020603:     }
020604: 
020605:     function renderVehicleCodeStatus() {
020606:         const drawer = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId);
020607:         if (!drawer || !drawer.classList.contains('mcms-open')) return;
020608: 
020609:         const snapshot = vehicleCodeStatusSnapshot();
020610:         const body = drawer.querySelector('[data-vcs-body]');
020611:         const total = drawer.querySelector('[data-vcs-total]');
020612:         const source = drawer.querySelector('[data-vcs-source]');
020613:         const updated = drawer.querySelector('[data-vcs-updated]');
020614:         if (!body || !total || !source || !updated) return;
020615: 
020616:         const html = snapshot.rows.map(row => `
020617:             <div class="mcms-vcs-table-row mcms-vcs-status-row${row.recognised ? '' : ' mcms-vcs-unknown'}" role="row" data-code="${escapeHtml(row.code)}">
020618:             <span class="mcms-vcs-code" role="cell" data-code="${escapeHtml(row.code)}">${escapeHtml(row.code)}</span>
020619:             <span class="mcms-vcs-status" role="cell">${escapeHtml(row.label)}</span>
020620:             <strong class="mcms-vcs-count" role="cell">${Number(row.count).toLocaleString()}</strong>
020621:         </div>`).join('');
020622:         const signature = `vehicle-status:${snapshot.complete}:${snapshot.updatedAt}:${snapshot.rows.map(row => `${row.code}:${row.count}`).join('|')}`;
020623:         setInnerHtmlIfChanged(body, html, signature);
020624:         total.textContent = snapshot.total.toLocaleString();
020625:         source.textContent = snapshot.complete ? 'Complete personal fleet' : 'Loading complete fleet · visible vehicles shown';
020626:         updated.textContent = snapshot.updatedAt ? `Updated ${formatClockTime(snapshot.updatedAt)}` : 'Updated —';
020627:         drawer.classList.toggle('mcms-vcs-loading', !snapshot.complete);
020628:     }
020629: 
020630:     function refreshVehicleCodeStatus(force = false) {
020631:         const drawer = createVehicleCodeStatus();
020632:         drawer.classList.add('mcms-vcs-loading');
020633:         const refreshButton = drawer.querySelector('.mcms-vcs-refresh');
020634:         if (refreshButton) refreshButton.disabled = true;
020635:         return refreshPersonalVehicleData(force)
020636:             .then(success => {
020637:                 renderVehicleCodeStatus();
020638:                 if (force) showToast(success ? 'Vehicle Code Status refreshed' : 'Vehicle status refresh failed');
020639:                 return success;
020640:             })
020641:             .finally(() => {
020642:                 drawer.classList.remove('mcms-vcs-loading');
020643:                 if (refreshButton) refreshButton.disabled = false;
020644:             });
020645:     }
020646: 
020647:     function closeVehicleCodeStatus() {
020648:         const drawer = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId);
020649:         if (!drawer) return;
020650:         closeCriticalViewControls(drawer);
020651:         drawer.classList.remove('mcms-open');
020652:         drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
020653:         updateUI();
020654:     }
020655: 
020656:     function toggleVehicleCodeStatus() {
020657:         const drawer = createVehicleCodeStatus();
020658:         const opening = !drawer.classList.contains('mcms-open');
020659:         if (!opening) {
020660:             closeVehicleCodeStatus();
020661:             return;
020662:         }
020663: 
020664:         const criticalDrawer = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId);
020665:         criticalDrawer?.classList.remove('mcms-open');
020666:         criticalDrawer?.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
020667:         drawer.classList.add('mcms-open');
020668:         drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
020669:         updateUI();
020670:         renderVehicleCodeStatus();
020671:         refreshVehicleCodeStatus(false);
020672:         runtimeSetTimeout(() => drawer.querySelector('.mcms-vcs-close')?.focus?.(), 0);
020673:     }
020674: 
020675:     function elementDockRect(element) {
020676:         if (!element?.isConnected || !isVisible(element)) return null;
020677:         let rect;
020678:         try { rect = element.getBoundingClientRect(); } catch (err) { return null; }
020679:         if (!rect || rect.width < 280 || rect.height < 180) return null;
020680:         return rect;
020681:     }
020682: 
020683:     function findMissionListDockRect() {
020684:         if (mobileModeActive) return null;
020685:         const viewportWidth = Math.max(1, Number(pageWindow.innerWidth) || document.documentElement.clientWidth || 1);
020686:         const viewportHeight = Math.max(1, Number(pageWindow.innerHeight) || document.documentElement.clientHeight || 1);
020687:         const mapElement = getLargestLeafletMap();
020688:         const mapRect = elementDockRect(mapElement);
020689:         const minimumLeft = mapRect ? mapRect.right - 48 : viewportWidth * 0.38;
020690:         const preferredSelectors = [
020691:             '#mission_list', '#missions', '#mission-list', '#missions-panel', '#mission_panel',
020692:             '#mission_list_wrapper', '#mission-list-wrapper', '.mission-list', '.missions-list',
020693:             '.mission-sidebar', '.missionSideBar', '.missionSideBarList', '.mission-list-container',
020694:             '[data-mission-list]', '[class*="mission-list"]'
020695:         ];
020696:         const candidates = new Set();
020697:         for (const selector of preferredSelectors) {
020698:             try { document.querySelectorAll(selector).forEach(element => candidates.add(element)); } catch (err) {}
020699:         }
020700: 
020701:         const missionLinks = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="/missions/"], a[href*="/missions/"]'))
020702:             .filter(link => {
020703:                 if (!link?.isConnected || !isVisible(link)) return false;
020704:                 try { return link.getBoundingClientRect().left >= minimumLeft; } catch (err) { return false; }
020705:             })
020706:             .slice(0, 32);
020707:         const missionRows = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.missionSideBarEntry, .mission-side-bar-entry, [data-mission-id], [id^="mission_"]'))
020708:             .filter(row => {
020709:                 if (!row?.isConnected || !isVisible(row) || row.closest?.(`#${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}`)) return false;
020710:                 try {
020711:                     const rect = row.getBoundingClientRect();
020712:                     return rect.width >= 250 && rect.height >= 30 && rect.left >= minimumLeft;
020713:                 } catch (err) { return false; }
020714:             })
020715:             .slice(0, 80);
020716:         for (const seed of [...missionLinks, ...missionRows]) {
020717:             let node = seed.parentElement;
020718:             for (let depth = 0; node && node !== document.body && depth < 10; depth += 1, node = node.parentElement) candidates.add(node);
020719:         }
020720: 
020721:         let best = null;
020722:         let bestScore = -Infinity;
020723:         for (const element of candidates) {
020724:             const rect = elementDockRect(element);
020725:             if (!rect || rect.left < minimumLeft || rect.right < viewportWidth * 0.68) continue;
020726:             if (rect.top > viewportHeight - 160 || rect.bottom < 220) continue;
020727:             let linkCount = 0;
020728:             let rowCount = 0;
020729:             try {
020730:                 linkCount = element.querySelectorAll('a[href^="/missions/"], a[href*="/missions/"]').length;
020731:                 rowCount = element.querySelectorAll('.missionSideBarEntry, .mission-side-bar-entry, [data-mission-id], [id^="mission_"]').length;
020732:             } catch (err) {}
020733:             const missionItemCount = Math.max(linkCount, rowCount);
020734:             if (missionItemCount < 2) continue;
020735:             const id = String(element.id || '').toLowerCase();
020736:             const classes = String(element.className || '').toLowerCase();
020737:         const identityBonus = id === 'mission_list' ? 6000 : id === 'missions' ? 4500 : /mission[-_ ]?list|mission[-_ ]?sidebar/.test(`${id} ${classes}`) ? 2600 : 0;
020738:         const widthPenalty = rect.width > viewportWidth * 0.72 ? (rect.width - viewportWidth * 0.72) * 8 : 0;
020739:         const scrollBonus = element.scrollHeight > element.clientHeight + 80 ? 900 : 0;
020740:         const rightEdgeBonus = rect.right >= viewportWidth - 40 ? 500 : 0;
020741:         const score = identityBonus + Math.min(missionItemCount, 100) * 120 + Math.min(rect.height, viewportHeight) + rect.width * 0.3 + scrollBonus + rightEdgeBonus - widthPenalty;
020742:         if (score > bestScore) {
020743:             bestScore = score;
020744:             best = rect;
020745:         }
020746:         }
020747: 
020748:         if (best) {
020749:         const left = Math.max(6, best.left);
020750:         const top = Math.max(6, best.top);
020751:         const right = Math.min(viewportWidth - 6, best.right);
020752:         const bottom = Math.min(viewportHeight - 6, best.bottom);
020753:         if (right - left >= 320 && bottom - top >= 240) return { left, top, width: right - left, height: bottom - top };
020754:         }
--- source lines 23843-24017, match 23898 ---
023843:             const hasEnrouteClass = Math.max(0, Number(entry.units?.onWay ?? entry.units?.travelling) || 0) > 0 ? ' mcms-critical-has-enroute' : '';
023844:             const specialEventClass = entry.specialEvent?.active ? ' mcms-critical-developer-event' : '';
023845:             const eligibilityHtml = entry.ownership === 'alliance' ? `<span class="mcms-critical-eligibility ${entry.eligibleForCredits ? 'mcms-eligible' : 'mcms-not-eligible'}">${entry.eligibleForCredits ? 'ELIGIBLE' : 'NO UNIT'}</span>` : '';
023846:             const ageText = Number.isFinite(entry.missionAge) ? formatElapsedCompact(entry.missionAge) : 'N/A';
023847:             return `
023848:             <article class="mcms-critical-row ${escapeHtml(entry.severity.className)} mcms-critical-state-${escapeHtml(operational.key)} mcms-critical-ownership-${escapeHtml(entry.ownership)} mcms-critical-category-${escapeHtml(entry.category)}${hasEnrouteClass}${specialEventClass}" role="group" data-mission-id="${escapeHtml(entry.missionId)}" data-critical-state="${escapeHtml(operational.key)}" data-mission-ownership="${escapeHtml(entry.ownership)}" data-mission-category="${escapeHtml(entry.category)}"${clearingStyle} aria-label="${escapeHtml(entry.caption)} mission status">
023849:                 <span class="mcms-critical-topline">
023850:                     <span class="mcms-critical-top-identifiers"><span class="mcms-critical-age-band">${escapeHtml(entry.severity.label)}</span><span class="mcms-critical-type-badge mcms-type-${escapeHtml(entry.ownership)}${entry.ownership === 'alliance' ? ' mcms-alliance-text' : ''}">${escapeHtml(missionWatchOwnershipLabel(entry.ownership))}</span><span class="mcms-critical-category-badge mcms-category-${escapeHtml(entry.category)}">${escapeHtml(missionWatchCategoryLabel(entry.category))}</span>${specialEventHtml}${eligibilityHtml}${locationHtml}${criticalDataQualityHtml(entry)}</span>
023851:                     <span class="mcms-critical-top-actions">${countdownHtml}<span class="mcms-critical-age">${escapeHtml(ageText)}</span><button class="mcms-critical-zoom" type="button" data-zoom-mission-id="${escapeHtml(entry.missionId)}" title="Zoom to ${escapeHtml(entry.caption)}" aria-label="Zoom to ${escapeHtml(entry.caption)}"><span aria-hidden="true">⌖</span> Zoom</button><button class="mcms-critical-open" type="button" data-open-mission-id="${escapeHtml(entry.missionId)}" title="Open ${escapeHtml(entry.caption)}" aria-label="Open ${escapeHtml(entry.caption)}"><span aria-hidden="true">↗</span> Open</button></span>
023852:                 </span>
023853:                 <span class="mcms-critical-titleline"><span class="mcms-critical-name">${escapeHtml(entry.caption)}</span><span class="mcms-critical-live-markers">${patientHtml}${prisonerHtml}</span></span>
023854:                 <span class="mcms-critical-lowerline">
023855:                     <span class="mcms-critical-state"><span class="mcms-critical-state-signal" aria-hidden="true"></span><span class="mcms-critical-state-copy"><strong>${escapeHtml(operational.label)}</strong><small>${escapeHtml(operational.detail)}</small></span></span>
023856:                     <span class="mcms-critical-unit-grid"><span class="mcms-critical-unit-chip mcms-unit-scene"><strong>${Math.max(0, Number(entry.units?.onScene) || 0)}</strong><small>ON SCENE</small></span><span class="mcms-critical-unit-chip mcms-unit-way"><strong>${Math.max(0, Number(entry.units?.onWay ?? entry.units?.travelling) || 0)}</strong><small>ON WAY</small></span></span>
023857:                     ${criticalAuxiliaryUnitHtml(entry.units)}
023858:                 </span>
023859:             </article>`;
023860:         }).join('') : allEntries.length ? '<div class="mcms-empty-state">No missions match the selected ownership, category, age and operational filters. Use Clear to reset the watcher.</div>' : '<div class="mcms-empty-state">No missions are currently available.</div>';
023861: 
023862:         const remaining = Math.max(0, visibleEntries.length - renderedEntries.length);
023863:         const footer = remaining > 0 ? `<div class="mcms-critical-list-footer"><span>Showing ${renderedEntries.length.toLocaleString('en-GB')} of ${visibleEntries.length.toLocaleString('en-GB')}</span><button type="button" data-critical-load-more>Load ${Math.min(CRITICAL_RENDER_BATCH_SIZE, remaining).toLocaleString('en-GB')} more</button></div>` : '';

023866:         const stateSignature = JSON.stringify(state.missionAgeWatch || {});

023879:         setInnerHtmlIfChanged(categoryFilters, criticalCategoryFiltersHtml(allEntries), `critical-category:${allSignature}:${stateSignature}`);

023888: 
023889:     async function refreshCriticalDrawer(showFeedback = false) {
023890:         if (criticalDrawerRefreshing) return false;
023891:         const drawer = createCriticalDrawer();
023892:         const refreshButton = drawer.querySelector('.mcms-drawer-refresh');
023893:         criticalDrawerRefreshing = true;
023894:         drawer.classList.add('mcms-critical-refreshing');
023895:         if (refreshButton) refreshButton.disabled = true;
023896:         try {
023897:             const [vehicleRefreshSucceeded, missionProgressRefreshed] = await Promise.all([
023898:                 refreshPersonalVehicleData(true),
023899:                 refreshMissionProgressFromPage(true, 0)
023900:             ]);
023901:             refreshMissionSnapshots();
023902:             applyCriticalViewFilter();
023903:             scheduleMissionAgeRefresh(0);
023904:             scheduleUnitCommitmentRefresh(0);
023905:             if (state.stuckDetector.enabled) scheduleStuckMissionRefresh(0);
023906:             if (vehicleRefreshSucceeded || missionProgressRefreshed) criticalDrawerLastDataSyncAt = Date.now();
023907:             resetCriticalVirtualWindow(drawer, false);
023908:             renderOperationalPanels(true, { updateViewTime: true, preserveScroll: true });
023909:             if (showFeedback) {
023910:                 const message = missionProgressRefreshed && vehicleRefreshSucceeded
023911:                     ? 'Mission Age Watch live data refreshed'
023912:                     : missionProgressRefreshed
023913:                         ? 'Mission progress refreshed · vehicle data cached'
023914:                         : vehicleRefreshSucceeded
023915:                             ? 'Vehicle data refreshed · mission progress cached'
023916:                             : 'Mission Age Watch redrawn from cached data';
023917:                 showToast(message);
023918:             }
023919:             return vehicleRefreshSucceeded || missionProgressRefreshed;
023920:         } catch (err) {
023921:             if (showFeedback) showToast('Mission Age Watch refresh failed');
023922:             return false;
023923:         } finally {
023924:             criticalDrawerRefreshing = false;
023925:             drawer.classList.remove('mcms-critical-refreshing');
023926:             if (refreshButton) refreshButton.disabled = false;
023927:         }
023928:     }
023929: 
023930:     function closeCriticalDrawer() {
023931:         const drawer = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId);
023932:         if (!drawer) return;
023933:         runtimeClearTimeout(criticalDrawerDockTimer);
023934:         criticalDrawerDockTimer = null;
023935:         drawer.classList.remove('mcms-open');
023936:         drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
023937:         clearCriticalDrawerDock(drawer);
023938:         updateUI();
023939:     }
023940: 
023941:     function toggleCriticalDrawer() {
023942:         const drawer = createCriticalDrawer();
023943:         const opening = !drawer.classList.contains('mcms-open');
023944:         if (!opening) {
023945:             closeCriticalDrawer();
023946:             return;
023947:         }
023948:         closeVehicleCodeStatus();
023949:         drawer.classList.add('mcms-open');
023950:         drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
023951:         updateCriticalDrawerExpandButton(drawer);
023952:         resetCriticalVirtualWindow(drawer, false);
023953:         renderCriticalDrawer(null, { updateViewTime: true });
023954:         refreshPersonalVehicleData(false).then(refreshed => {
023955:             if (!refreshed || !drawer.classList.contains('mcms-open')) return;
023956:             refreshMissionSnapshots();
023957:             criticalDrawerLastDataSyncAt = Math.max(criticalDrawerLastDataSyncAt, vehicleApiLastFetch, vehicleStatusLastUpdate);
023958:             renderOperationalPanels(true, { updateViewTime: false, preserveScroll: true });
023959:         });
023960:         positionCriticalDrawerOverMissionList();
023961:         scheduleCriticalDrawerDock(140);
023962:         updateUI();
023963:         runtimeSetTimeout(() => drawer.querySelector('.mcms-drawer-close')?.focus?.(), 0);
023964:     }
023965: 
023966:     function missionLockOnReducedMotion() {
023967:         try { return Boolean(pageWindow.matchMedia?.('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)')?.matches); }
023968:         catch (err) { return false; }
023969:     }
023970: 
023971:     function missionLockOnThemeLabel() {
023972:         const labels = {
023973:             mapCommand: 'MISSION LOCKED',
023974:             cyberpunk: 'SIGNAL ACQUIRED',
023975:             fallout4: 'TARGET ACQUIRED',
023976:             umbrella: 'INCIDENT LOCKED',
023977:             factorio: 'COORDINATES LOCKED'
023978:         };
023979:         return labels[state.uiTheme] || labels.mapCommand;
023980:     }
023981: 
023982:     function playMissionLockTrackingSound() {
023983:         if (!state.missionLockAudio) return false;
023984:         const context = unlockPayoutAudio(true);
023985:         if (!context) return false;
023986:         try {
023987:             const now = context.currentTime + 0.012;
023988:             const master = context.createGain();
023989:             master.gain.setValueAtTime(0.0001, now);
023990:             master.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.075, now + 0.025);
023991:             master.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001, now + 1.08);
023992:             master.connect(context.destination);
023993: 
023994:             connectAudioNoise(context, master, { start: now, duration: 0.075, gain: 0.11, filterFrequency: 1800 });
023995:             const tracking = [
023996:                 [0.04, 620, 0.055, 'square', 0.09, 810],
023997:                 [0.20, 760, 0.050, 'square', 0.08, 980],
023998:                 [0.36, 920, 0.050, 'square', 0.075, 1180],
023999:                 [0.52, 1120, 0.048, 'square', 0.07, 1420]
024000:             ];
024001:             for (const [delay, frequency, duration, type, gain, endFrequency] of tracking) {
024002:                 connectAudioTone(context, master, {
024003:                     start: now + delay,
024004:                     duration,
024005:                     frequency,
024006:                     endFrequency,
024007:                     type,
024008:                     gain
024009:                 });
024010:             }
024011:             connectAudioTone(context, master, {
024012:                 start: now + 0.70,
024013:                 duration: 0.22,
024014:                 frequency: 1480,
024015:                 endFrequency: 1960,
024016:                 type: 'sine',
024017:                 gain: 0.10
--- source lines 23899-24073, match 23954 ---
023899:                 refreshMissionProgressFromPage(true, 0)
023900:             ]);
023901:             refreshMissionSnapshots();
023902:             applyCriticalViewFilter();
023903:             scheduleMissionAgeRefresh(0);
023904:             scheduleUnitCommitmentRefresh(0);
023905:             if (state.stuckDetector.enabled) scheduleStuckMissionRefresh(0);
023906:             if (vehicleRefreshSucceeded || missionProgressRefreshed) criticalDrawerLastDataSyncAt = Date.now();
023907:             resetCriticalVirtualWindow(drawer, false);
023908:             renderOperationalPanels(true, { updateViewTime: true, preserveScroll: true });
023909:             if (showFeedback) {
023910:                 const message = missionProgressRefreshed && vehicleRefreshSucceeded
023911:                     ? 'Mission Age Watch live data refreshed'
023912:                     : missionProgressRefreshed
023913:                         ? 'Mission progress refreshed · vehicle data cached'
023914:                         : vehicleRefreshSucceeded
023915:                             ? 'Vehicle data refreshed · mission progress cached'
023916:                             : 'Mission Age Watch redrawn from cached data';
023917:                 showToast(message);
023918:             }
023919:             return vehicleRefreshSucceeded || missionProgressRefreshed;
023920:         } catch (err) {
023921:             if (showFeedback) showToast('Mission Age Watch refresh failed');
023922:             return false;
023923:         } finally {
023924:             criticalDrawerRefreshing = false;
023925:             drawer.classList.remove('mcms-critical-refreshing');
023926:             if (refreshButton) refreshButton.disabled = false;
023927:         }
023928:     }
023929: 
023930:     function closeCriticalDrawer() {
023931:         const drawer = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId);
023932:         if (!drawer) return;
023933:         runtimeClearTimeout(criticalDrawerDockTimer);
023934:         criticalDrawerDockTimer = null;
023935:         drawer.classList.remove('mcms-open');
023936:         drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
023937:         clearCriticalDrawerDock(drawer);
023938:         updateUI();
023939:     }
023940: 
023941:     function toggleCriticalDrawer() {
023942:         const drawer = createCriticalDrawer();
023943:         const opening = !drawer.classList.contains('mcms-open');
023944:         if (!opening) {
023945:             closeCriticalDrawer();
023946:             return;
023947:         }
023948:         closeVehicleCodeStatus();
023949:         drawer.classList.add('mcms-open');
023950:         drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
023951:         updateCriticalDrawerExpandButton(drawer);
023952:         resetCriticalVirtualWindow(drawer, false);
023953:         renderCriticalDrawer(null, { updateViewTime: true });
023954:         refreshPersonalVehicleData(false).then(refreshed => {
023955:             if (!refreshed || !drawer.classList.contains('mcms-open')) return;
023956:             refreshMissionSnapshots();
023957:             criticalDrawerLastDataSyncAt = Math.max(criticalDrawerLastDataSyncAt, vehicleApiLastFetch, vehicleStatusLastUpdate);
023958:             renderOperationalPanels(true, { updateViewTime: false, preserveScroll: true });
023959:         });
023960:         positionCriticalDrawerOverMissionList();
023961:         scheduleCriticalDrawerDock(140);
023962:         updateUI();
023963:         runtimeSetTimeout(() => drawer.querySelector('.mcms-drawer-close')?.focus?.(), 0);
023964:     }
023965: 
023966:     function missionLockOnReducedMotion() {
023967:         try { return Boolean(pageWindow.matchMedia?.('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)')?.matches); }
023968:         catch (err) { return false; }
023969:     }
023970: 
023971:     function missionLockOnThemeLabel() {
023972:         const labels = {
023973:             mapCommand: 'MISSION LOCKED',
023974:             cyberpunk: 'SIGNAL ACQUIRED',
023975:             fallout4: 'TARGET ACQUIRED',
023976:             umbrella: 'INCIDENT LOCKED',
023977:             factorio: 'COORDINATES LOCKED'
023978:         };
023979:         return labels[state.uiTheme] || labels.mapCommand;
023980:     }
023981: 
023982:     function playMissionLockTrackingSound() {
023983:         if (!state.missionLockAudio) return false;
023984:         const context = unlockPayoutAudio(true);
023985:         if (!context) return false;
023986:         try {
023987:             const now = context.currentTime + 0.012;
023988:             const master = context.createGain();
023989:             master.gain.setValueAtTime(0.0001, now);
023990:             master.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.075, now + 0.025);
023991:             master.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001, now + 1.08);
023992:             master.connect(context.destination);
023993: 
023994:             connectAudioNoise(context, master, { start: now, duration: 0.075, gain: 0.11, filterFrequency: 1800 });
023995:             const tracking = [
023996:                 [0.04, 620, 0.055, 'square', 0.09, 810],
023997:                 [0.20, 760, 0.050, 'square', 0.08, 980],
023998:                 [0.36, 920, 0.050, 'square', 0.075, 1180],
023999:                 [0.52, 1120, 0.048, 'square', 0.07, 1420]
024000:             ];
024001:             for (const [delay, frequency, duration, type, gain, endFrequency] of tracking) {
024002:                 connectAudioTone(context, master, {
024003:                     start: now + delay,
024004:                     duration,
024005:                     frequency,
024006:                     endFrequency,
024007:                     type,
024008:                     gain
024009:                 });
024010:             }
024011:             connectAudioTone(context, master, {
024012:                 start: now + 0.70,
024013:                 duration: 0.22,
024014:                 frequency: 1480,
024015:                 endFrequency: 1960,
024016:                 type: 'sine',
024017:                 gain: 0.10
024018:             });
024019:             connectAudioTone(context, master, {
024020:                 start: now + 0.90,
024021:                 duration: 0.16,
024022:                 frequency: 980,
024023:                 endFrequency: 980,
024024:                 type: 'triangle',
024025:                 gain: 0.13
024026:             });
024027:             return true;
024028:         } catch (err) {
024029:             return false;
024030:         }
024031:     }
024032: 
024033:     function clearMissionLockOnEffect() {
024034:         missionLockOnToken += 1;
024035:         runtimeClearTimeout(missionLockOnTimer);
024036:         missionLockOnTimer = null;
024037:         if (missionLockOnMoveEndMap && missionLockOnMoveEndHandler) {
024038:             try { missionLockOnMoveEndMap.off?.('moveend', missionLockOnMoveEndHandler); } catch (err) {}
024039:         }
024040:         missionLockOnMoveEndMap = null;
024041:         missionLockOnMoveEndHandler = null;
024042:         if (missionLockOnTravelOverlay) {
024043:             try { missionLockOnTravelOverlay.remove(); } catch (err) {}
024044:             missionLockOnTravelOverlay = null;
024045:         }
024046:         if (missionLockOnMarker) {
024047:             try { missionLockOnMarker.remove?.(); } catch (err) {
024048:                 try { missionLockOnMarker._map?.removeLayer?.(missionLockOnMarker); } catch (nestedError) {}
024049:             }
024050:             missionLockOnMarker = null;
024051:         }
024052:         if (missionLockOnTargetIcon?.classList) {
024053:             missionLockOnTargetIcon.classList.remove('mcms-mission-lock-target', 'mcms-critical-view-focus');
024054:         }
024055:         missionLockOnTargetIcon = null;
024056:     }
024057: 
024058:     function createMissionLockOnTravelOverlay(map) {
024059:         const container = map?.getContainer?.();
024060:         if (!container) return null;
024061:         const overlay = document.createElement('div');
024062:         overlay.className = 'mcms-mission-lock-travel-overlay';
024063:         overlay.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
024064:         container.appendChild(overlay);
024065:         missionLockOnTravelOverlay = overlay;
024066:         return overlay;
024067:     }
024068: 
024069:     function resolveMissionLockOnMarker(marker, missionId) {
024070:         const id = normaliseMissionId(missionId);
024071:         if (id !== null) {
024072:             const current = getMissionMarkerIndex().byId.get(id) || null;
024073:             if (current && !isToolkitLeafletLayer(current)) return current;
--- source lines 24262-24436, match 24317 ---
024262:     }
024263: 
024264:     function fitCriticalMissions() {
024265:         const entries = getCriticalMissionEntries(CRITICAL_VIEW_MIN_AGE_MS);
024266:         const map = findLeafletMapInstance(false);
024267:         if (!map || !entries.length) return false;
024268:         const points = entries.map(entry => {
024269:             try { return entry.marker.getLatLng?.(); } catch (err) { return null; }
024270:         }).filter(Boolean);
024271:         if (!points.length) return false;
024272:         try {
024273:             map.invalidateSize?.({ pan: false });
024274:             if (points.length === 1) map.setView(points[0], Math.max(Number(map.getZoom?.()) || 0, 13));
024275:             else map.fitBounds(pageWindow.L.latLngBounds(points), { padding: [54, 54], maxZoom: 14 });
024276:             return true;
024277:         } catch (err) { return false; }
024278:     }
024279: 
024280:     async function toggleCriticalView() {
024281:         if (criticalViewLoading) return;
024282: 
024283:         if (criticalViewActive) {
024284:             const previousView = criticalViewSnapshot?.mapView;
024285:             criticalViewActive = false;
024286:             if (criticalViewSnapshot) {
024287:                 state.visibility = { ...state.visibility, ...criticalViewSnapshot.visibility };
024288:                 state.allianceCredits = criticalViewSnapshot.allianceCredits;
024289:                 state.missionAge = criticalViewSnapshot.missionAge;
024290:                 state.transportWatcher = criticalViewSnapshot.transportWatcher !== false;
024291:                 state.unitCommitment = criticalViewSnapshot.unitCommitment;
024292:             }
024293:             criticalViewSnapshot = null;
024294:             document.querySelectorAll('.mcms-critical-view-hidden').forEach(icon => icon.classList.remove('mcms-critical-view-hidden'));
024295:             const criticalDrawer = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId);
024296:             criticalDrawer?.classList.remove('mcms-open');
024297:             criticalDrawer?.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
024298:             saveState();
024299:             applyRootAttributes();
024300:             updateUI();
024301:             synchroniseVehicleMarkerClasses();
024302:             synchronisePersonalBuildingVisibility();
024303:             reconcileFeatureRefreshes({ includeSnapshots: missionSnapshotsNeeded(), positionPanel: false });
024304:             if (previousView) {
024305:                 runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
024306:                     const map = findLeafletMapInstance(false);
024307:                     try { map?.setView?.([previousView.lat, previousView.lng], previousView.zoom); } catch (err) {}
024308:                 }, 220);
024309:             }
024310:             showToast('Critical View restored');
024311:             return;
024312:         }
024313: 
024314:         criticalViewLoading = true;
024315:         showToast('Preparing age-based Critical View…');
024316:         try {
024317:             await refreshPersonalVehicleData(true);
024318:             const entries = getCriticalMissionEntries(CRITICAL_VIEW_MIN_AGE_MS);
024319:             if (!entries.length) {
024320:                 showToast('No personal missions are currently 8 hours old or more');
024321:                 updateUI();
024322:                 return;
024323:             }
024324: 
024325:             const map = findLeafletMapInstance(false);
024326:             let mapView = null;
024327:             try {
024328:                 const centre = map?.getCenter?.();
024329:                 const zoom = map?.getZoom?.();
024330:                 if (centre && Number.isFinite(Number(zoom))) mapView = { lat: centre.lat, lng: centre.lng, zoom: Number(zoom) };
024331:             } catch (err) {}
024332: 
024333:             criticalViewSnapshot = {
024334:                 visibility: { ...state.visibility },
024335:                 allianceCredits: state.allianceCredits,
024336:                 allianceCreditMinimum: state.allianceCreditMinimum,
024337:                 missionAge: state.missionAge,
024338:                 transportWatcher: state.transportWatcher,
024339:                 unitCommitment: state.unitCommitment,
024340:                 mapView
024341:             };
024342:             criticalViewActive = true;
024343:             state.visibility = { ...state.visibility, allianceMissions: false, myMissions: true, vehicles: false, buildings: false };
024344:             state.allianceCredits = false;
024345:             state.missionAge = true;
024346:             state.unitCommitment = true;
024347: 
024348:             applyRootAttributes();
024349:             updateUI();
024350:             synchroniseVehicleMarkerClasses();
024351:             synchronisePersonalBuildingVisibility();
024352:             reconcileFeatureRefreshes({ includeSnapshots: missionSnapshotsNeeded(), positionPanel: false });
024353:             runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
024354:                 applyCriticalViewFilter();
024355:                 fitCriticalMissions();
024356:                 const drawer = createCriticalDrawer();
024357:                 drawer.classList.add('mcms-open');
024358:                 drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
024359:                 renderCriticalDrawer();
024360:                 updateUI();
024361:             }, 360);
024362:             showToast(`Critical View on · ${entries.length} aged mission${entries.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}`);
024363:         } finally {
024364:             criticalViewLoading = false;
024365:             updateUI();
024366:         }
024367:     }
024368: 
024369: 
024370:     function loadMissionProgressState() {
024371:         try {
024372:             const parsed = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(SCRIPT.missionProgressState) || '{}');
024373:             if (!parsed || typeof parsed !== 'object' || Array.isArray(parsed)) return new Map();
024374:             const now = Date.now();
024375:             return new Map(Object.entries(parsed)
024376:                 .filter(([, record]) => record && typeof record === 'object' && now - Number(record.lastSeen || record.lastChanged || now) < 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000)
024377:                 .map(([missionId, record]) => [String(missionId), {
024378:                     signature: String(record.signature || ''),
024379:                     lastChanged: Number(record.lastChanged) || now,
024380:                     lastSeen: Number(record.lastSeen) || now,
024381:                     tracked: Boolean(record.tracked)
024382:                 }]));
024383:         } catch (err) {
024384:             return new Map();
024385:         }
024386:     }
024387: 
024388:     function saveMissionProgressState(delay = 1200) {
024389:         runtimeClearTimeout(missionProgressSaveTimer);
024390:         missionProgressSaveTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
024391:             try {
024392:                 const now = Date.now();
024393:                 const entries = Array.from(missionProgressState.entries())
024394:                     .filter(([, record]) => now - Number(record.lastSeen || record.lastChanged || now) < 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000)
024395:                     .sort((a, b) => Number(b[1].lastSeen || 0) - Number(a[1].lastSeen || 0))
024396:                     .slice(0, 500);
024397:                 localStorage.setItem(SCRIPT.missionProgressState, JSON.stringify(Object.fromEntries(entries)));
024398:             } catch (err) {}
024399:         }, Math.max(0, Number(delay) || 0));
024400:     }
024401: 
024402:     function missionProgressSignature(snapshot) {
024403:         const units = snapshot?.units || {};
024404:         return [
024405:             String(snapshot?.missingText || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim().toLowerCase(),
024406:             Number.isFinite(Number(snapshot?.patientsCount)) ? Number(snapshot.patientsCount) : '',
024407:             Number.isFinite(Number(snapshot?.prisonersCount)) ? Number(snapshot.prisonersCount) : '',
024408:             Number.isFinite(Number(snapshot?.liveCurrentValue)) ? Number(snapshot.liveCurrentValue) : '',
024409:             Number.isFinite(Number(snapshot?.vehicleState)) ? Number(snapshot.vehicleState) : '',
024410:             Number(units.total) || 0,
024411:             Number(units.onScene) || 0,
024412:             Number(units.travelling) || 0
024413:         ].join('|');
024414:     }
024415: 
024416:     function updateMissionProgressState(snapshot, now = Date.now()) {
024417:         if (!snapshot?.missionId) return null;
024418:         const tracked = snapshot.source === 'personal' || Number(snapshot.units?.total) > 0;
024419:         const signature = missionProgressSignature(snapshot);
024420:         let record = missionProgressState.get(snapshot.missionId);
024421: 
024422:         let changed = false;
024423:         if (!record) {
024424:             record = { signature, lastChanged: now, lastSeen: now, tracked };
024425:             missionProgressState.set(snapshot.missionId, record);
024426:             changed = true;
024427:         } else {
024428:             if (record.signature !== signature || record.tracked !== tracked) {
024429:                 record.signature = signature;
024430:                 record.lastChanged = now;
024431:                 changed = true;
024432:             }
024433:             record.lastSeen = now;
024434:             record.tracked = tracked;
024435:         }
024436:         if (changed) saveMissionProgressState();
--- source lines 28801-28975, match 28856 ---
028801:             showToast('Discord report failed');
028802:         } finally {
028803:             discordFinanceBusy = false;
028804:         }
028805:     }
028806: 
028807:     function clearDiscordWebhook() {
028808:         if (!getDiscordWebhookUrl()) {
028809:             setDiscordStatus('No Discord webhook is currently saved.', 'neutral');
028810:             return;
028811:         }
028812:         if (!pageWindow.confirm('Remove the saved Discord webhook from Tampermonkey storage?')) return;
028813:         gmDeleteValueSafe(SCRIPT.discordWebhookState);
028814:         const input = document.querySelector(`#${SCRIPT.panelId} [data-setting="discord-webhook"]`);
028815:         if (input) input.value = '';
028816:         setDiscordStatus('Saved Discord webhook removed.', 'good');
028817:         showToast('Discord webhook cleared');
028818:     }
028819: 
028820: 
028821:     function setStatus(text) {
028822:         const status = document.querySelector(`#${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-status`);
028823:         if (status) status.textContent = text || 'Ready.';
028824:     }
028825: 
028826:     function showToast(text) {
028827:         let toast = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.toastId);
028828:         if (!toast) {
028829:             toast = document.createElement('div');
028830:             toast.id = SCRIPT.toastId;
028831:             document.body.appendChild(toast);
028832:         }
028833:         toast.textContent = text;
028834:         toast.classList.add('mcms-flash');
028835:         runtimeClearTimeout(toastFlashTimer);
028836:         toastFlashTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
028837:             toastFlashTimer = null;
028838:             toast.classList.remove('mcms-flash');
028839:         }, 950);
028840:     }
028841: 
028842:     function applyTheme(themeKey, persist = true) {
028843:         state.theme = normaliseTheme(themeKey);
028844:         if (persist) saveState();
028845:         applyRootAttributes();
028846:         updateUI();
028847:         showToast(THEMES[state.theme].full);
028848:     }
028849: 
028850:     function setActiveTab(tab) {
028851:         if (!['skins', 'tools', 'resources', 'ops', 'payouts', 'discord', 'places', 'settings'].includes(tab)) return;
028852:         state.activeTab = tab;
028853:         saveState();
028854:         updateUI();
028855:         if (!dragState) positionPanelOverlay(true);
028856:         if (tab === 'ops') refreshPersonalVehicleData(false).finally(() => scheduleOperationalPanelsRender(0, true));
028857:     }
028858: 
028859:     function applyPosition(position, persist = true) {
028860:         state.position = POSITIONS[position] ? position : 'bl';
028861:         if (persist) saveState();
028862:         updateUI();
028863:         fitControlToMap();
028864:     }
028865: 
028866:     function nudgeControl(dx, dy) {
028867:         state.nudge.x = clamp(state.nudge.x + dx, -220, 220, 0);
028868:         state.nudge.y = clamp(state.nudge.y + dy, -220, 220, 0);
028869:         saveState();
028870:         updateUI();
028871:     }
028872: 
028873:     function resetNudge() {
028874:         state.nudge = { x: 0, y: 0 };
028875:         saveState();
028876:         updateUI();
028877:     }
028878: 
028879:     function toggleCommandBar() {
028880:         if (commandBarAnimating) return;
028881:         const control = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.controlId);
028882:         const opening = state.commandBarOpen === false;
028883:         const animatedItems = control
028884:             ? Array.from(control.querySelectorAll('.mcms-float-btn, .mcms-screen-pin-btn'))
028885:             : [];
028886:         const reduceMotion = Boolean(state.economyMode || pageWindow.matchMedia?.('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches);
028887:         const duration = reduceMotion ? 0 : (mobileModeActive ? 145 : 175);
028888:         const stagger = reduceMotion ? 0 : (mobileModeActive ? 5 : 7);
028889:         const maxDelay = Math.min(Math.max(0, animatedItems.length - 1) * stagger, 70);
028890:         const clearAnimationStyles = () => {
028891:             for (const item of animatedItems) {
028892:                 item.style.removeProperty('opacity');
028893:                 item.style.removeProperty('transform');
028894:                 item.style.removeProperty('transition');
028895:                 item.style.removeProperty('transition-delay');
028896:                 item.style.removeProperty('will-change');
028897:             }
028898:         };
028899:         if (commandBarAnimationTimer !== null) {
028900:             runtimeClearTimeout(commandBarAnimationTimer);
028901:             commandBarAnimationTimer = null;
028902:         }
028903:         if (opening) {
028904:             state.commandBarOpen = true;
028905:             saveState();
028906:             updateUI();
028907:             fitControlToMap();
028908:             if (duration > 0 && animatedItems.length) {
028909:                 commandBarAnimating = true;
028910:                 const targetStyles = animatedItems.map(item => {
028911:                     const computed = pageWindow.getComputedStyle(item);
028912:                     return {
028913:                         opacity: computed.opacity || '1',
028914:                         transform: computed.transform === 'none' ? 'none' : computed.transform
028915:                     };
028916:                 });
028917:                 animatedItems.forEach(item => {
028918:                     item.style.setProperty('transition', 'none', 'important');
028919:                     item.style.setProperty('transition-delay', '0ms', 'important');
028920:                     item.style.setProperty('opacity', '0', 'important');
028921:                     item.style.setProperty('transform', 'translateX(-10px) scale(.94)', 'important');
028922:                     item.style.setProperty('will-change', 'opacity, transform', 'important');
028923:                 });
028924:                 void control.offsetWidth;
028925:                 runtimeRequestAnimationFrame(() => {
028926:                     animatedItems.forEach((item, index) => {
028927:                         item.style.setProperty('transition', `opacity ${duration}ms cubic-bezier(.2,.78,.22,1), transform ${duration}ms cubic-bezier(.2,.78,.22,1)`, 'important');
028928:                         item.style.setProperty('transition-delay', `${Math.min(index * stagger, 70)}ms`, 'important');
028929:                         item.style.setProperty('opacity', targetStyles[index].opacity, 'important');
028930:                         item.style.setProperty('transform', targetStyles[index].transform, 'important');
028931:                     });
028932:                 });
028933:                 commandBarAnimationTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
028934:                     commandBarAnimationTimer = null;
028935:                     clearAnimationStyles();
028936:                     commandBarAnimating = false;
028937:                 }, duration + maxDelay + 35);
028938:             }
028939:             showToast('Command bar expanded');
028940:             return;
028941:         }
028942:         if (duration <= 0 || !animatedItems.length) {
028943:             state.commandBarOpen = false;
028944:             saveState();
028945:             updateUI();
028946:             fitControlToMap();
028947:             showToast('Command bar collapsed');
028948:             return;
028949:         }
028950:         commandBarAnimating = true;
028951:         animatedItems.forEach((item, index) => {
028952:             const computed = pageWindow.getComputedStyle(item);
028953:             item.style.setProperty('transition', 'none', 'important');
028954:             item.style.setProperty('transition-delay', '0ms', 'important');
028955:             item.style.setProperty('opacity', computed.opacity || '1', 'important');
028956:             item.style.setProperty('transform', computed.transform === 'none' ? 'none' : computed.transform, 'important');
028957:             item.style.setProperty('will-change', 'opacity, transform', 'important');
028958:             item.dataset.mcmsCollapseDelay = String(Math.min(index * stagger, 70));
028959:         });
028960:         void control.offsetWidth;
028961:         runtimeRequestAnimationFrame(() => {
028962:             for (const item of animatedItems) {
028963:                 item.style.setProperty('transition', `opacity ${duration}ms cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1), transform ${duration}ms cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1)`, 'important');
028964:                 item.style.setProperty('transition-delay', `${item.dataset.mcmsCollapseDelay || 0}ms`, 'important');
028965:                 item.style.setProperty('opacity', '0', 'important');
028966:                 item.style.setProperty('transform', 'translateX(-10px) scale(.94)', 'important');
028967:                 delete item.dataset.mcmsCollapseDelay;
028968:             }
028969:         });
028970:         commandBarAnimationTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
028971:             commandBarAnimationTimer = null;
028972:             state.commandBarOpen = false;
028973:             saveState();
028974:             updateUI();
028975:             fitControlToMap();
--- source lines 29002-29176, match 29057 ---
029002:         if (feature === 'missionAge') state.missionAge = !state.missionAge;
029003:         if (feature === 'unitCommitment') state.unitCommitment = !state.unitCommitment;
029004:         if (feature === 'transportWatcher') state.transportWatcher = !state.transportWatcher;
029005:         if (feature === 'missionInspector') state.missionInspector = !state.missionInspector;
029006:         if (feature === 'missionValue') state.missionValue = !state.missionValue;
029007:         if (feature === 'missionRequirements') state.missionRequirements = !state.missionRequirements;
029008:         if (feature === 'stuckDetector') state.stuckDetector.enabled = !state.stuckDetector.enabled;
029009:         if (feature === 'missionSpawn') state.missionSpawn.enabled = !state.missionSpawn.enabled;
029010:         if (feature === 'missionSpawn') {
029011:             missionSpawnArmed = false;
029012:             runtimeClearTimeout(missionSpawnPrimeTimer);
029013:             knownMissionIds.clear();
029014:             if (state.missionSpawn.enabled) primeMissionSpawnDetector();
029015:         }
029016:         if (feature === 'resourceGap') state.resourceGap.enabled = !state.resourceGap.enabled;
029017:         if (feature === 'criticalView') { toggleCriticalView(); return; }
029018:         if (feature === 'payoutFlash') state.payoutFlash.enabled = !state.payoutFlash.enabled;
029019:         if (feature === 'payoutSound') {
029020:             state.payoutFlash.soundEnabled = !state.payoutFlash.soundEnabled;
029021:             if (state.payoutFlash.soundEnabled) unlockPayoutAudio();
029022:             else disposePayoutMediaAudio();
029023:         }
029024:         if (feature === 'compactDock') state.compactDock = !state.compactDock;
029025:         if (feature === 'autoNight') {
029026:             state.autoNight.enabled = !state.autoNight.enabled;
029027:             state.autoNight.lastBucket = '';
029028:         }
029029:         if (feature === 'allianceMissions') state.visibility.allianceMissions = !state.visibility.allianceMissions;
029030:         if (feature === 'myMissions') state.visibility.myMissions = !state.visibility.myMissions;
029031:         if (feature === 'vehicles') state.visibility.vehicles = !state.visibility.vehicles;
029032:         if (feature === 'buildings') state.visibility.buildings = !state.visibility.buildings;
029033:         if (state.cleanMode) closePanel();
029034:         if (!criticalViewActive) saveState();
029035:         applyRootAttributes();
029036:         updateUI();
029037:         if (feature === 'vehicles') synchroniseVehicleMarkerClasses();
029038:         if (feature === 'buildings') synchronisePersonalBuildingVisibility();
029039:         if (state.economyMode && (feature === 'vehicles' || feature === 'buildings')) scheduleEconomyLayerSync(0);
029040:         reconcileFeatureRefreshes({ includeSnapshots: missionSnapshotsNeeded(), positionPanel: false });
029041:         if (feature === 'missionValue') {
029042:             if (state.missionValue) installMissionValueWindows();
029043:             else clearMissionValueIndicators();
029044:             showToast(state.missionValue ? 'Mission Value on' : 'Mission Value off');
029045:         }
029046:         if (feature === 'missionRequirements') {
029047:             if (state.missionRequirements) installMissionRequirementsWindows();
029048:             else clearMissionRequirementsPanels();
029049:             showToast(state.missionRequirements ? 'Mission Requirements on' : 'Mission Requirements off');
029050:         }
029051:         if (feature === 'autoLoadAllVehicles') showToast(state.autoLoadAllVehicles ? 'Auto-load all vehicles on' : 'Auto-load all vehicles off');
029052:         if (feature === 'allianceCredits') showToast(state.allianceCredits ? 'Alliance credits on' : 'Alliance credits off');
029053:         if (feature === 'missionAge') showToast(state.missionAge ? 'Personal mission age on' : 'Personal mission age off');
029054:         if (feature === 'unitCommitment') {
029055:             if (state.unitCommitment) {
029056:                 showToast('Loading unit assignments…');
029057:                 refreshPersonalVehicleData(true).then(ok => {
029058:                     scheduleUnitCommitmentRefresh(0);
029059:                     showToast(ok ? 'Unit Count on' : 'Unit Count on · live vehicle data unavailable');
029060:                 });
029061:             } else showToast('Unit Count off');
029062:         }
029063:         if (feature === 'transportWatcher') showToast(state.transportWatcher ? 'Transport Watcher on' : 'Transport Watcher off');
029064:         if (feature === 'majorIncidentFeed') {
029065:             if (state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled) {
029066:                 refreshMissionSnapshots();
029067:                 scheduleMajorIncidentFeedRender(0);
029068:             } else removeMajorIncidentFeed();
029069:             showToast(state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled ? 'Major Incident Feed on' : 'Major Incident Feed off');
029070:         }
029071:         if (feature === 'missionLockAudio') showToast(state.missionLockAudio ? 'Mission tracking audio on' : 'Mission tracking audio off');
029072:         if (feature === 'allianceBuildingsMapBlocker') {
029073:             if (state.allianceBuildingsMap === false) {
029074:                 installAllianceBuildingsEarlyStyle();
029075:                 installAllianceBuildingsLeafletAssignmentGuard();
029076:                 installAllianceBuildingsContextWatcherEarly();
029077:             } else {
029078:                 clearAllianceBuildingsEarlyContext();
029079:             }
029080:             showToast(state.allianceBuildingsMap === false ? 'Alliance Map Blocker ON · reloading' : 'Alliance Map Blocker OFF · reloading');
029081:             if (isAllianceBuildingsContext()) runtimeSetTimeout(() => location.reload(), 180);
029082:         }
029083:         if (feature === 'missionInspector') showToast(state.missionInspector ? 'Mission Inspector on' : 'Mission Inspector off');
029084:         if (feature === 'stuckDetector') showToast(state.stuckDetector.enabled ? `Stuck detector on · ${state.stuckDetector.thresholdMin} min` : 'Stuck detector off');
029085:         if (feature === 'missionSpawn') showToast(state.missionSpawn.enabled ? 'New mission animation on' : 'New mission animation off');
029086:         if (feature === 'resourceGap') {
029087:             if (state.resourceGap.enabled) refreshPersonalVehicleData(false).then(() => { scheduleResourceGapRefresh(0); refreshVisibleMissionInspector(); });
029088:             showToast(state.resourceGap.enabled ? `Resource Gap on · ${state.resourceGap.radiusMi}mi` : 'Resource Gap off');
029089:         }
029090:         if (feature === 'payoutSound') showToast(state.payoutFlash.soundEnabled ? 'Theme audio on · hosted MP3 cues load only when played' : 'Theme audio off');
029091:         if (feature === 'payoutFlash') showToast(state.payoutFlash.enabled ? 'Emergency payout flash on' : 'Emergency payout flash off');
029092:         if (feature === 'autoNight') runAutoNight(true);
029093:     }
029094: 
029095:     function runAutoNight(force = false) {
029096:         if (!state.autoNight.enabled) return;
029097:         const bucket = isNightNow(state.autoNight.nightStart, state.autoNight.dayStart) ? 'night' : 'day';
029098:         if (!force && state.autoNight.lastBucket === bucket) return;
029099:         state.autoNight.lastBucket = bucket;
029100:         state.theme = bucket === 'night' ? normaliseTheme(state.autoNight.nightTheme) : normaliseTheme(state.autoNight.dayTheme);
029101:         saveState();
029102:         applyRootAttributes();
029103:         updateUI();
029104:     }
029105: 
029106:     function isNightNow(start, end) {
029107:         const now = new Date();
029108:         const current = now.getHours() * 60 + now.getMinutes();
029109:         const startMin = parseTime(start, 19 * 60);
029110:         const endMin = parseTime(end, 7 * 60);
029111:         if (startMin === endMin) return false;
029112:         if (startMin < endMin) return current >= startMin && current < endMin;
029113:         return current >= startMin || current < endMin;
029114:     }
029115: 
029116:     function parseTime(value, fallback) {
029117:         const match = String(value || '').match(/^(\d{1,2}):(\d{2})$/);
029118:         if (!match) return fallback;
029119:         return clamp(match[1], 0, 23, Math.floor(fallback / 60)) * 60 + clamp(match[2], 0, 59, fallback % 60);
029120:     }
029121: 
029122:     function shouldSuppressControl() {
029123:         if (state.cleanMode) return false;
029124:         if (document.body && document.body.classList.contains('modal-open')) return true;
029125:         return SUPPRESSION_SELECTORS.some(selector => {
029126:             let nodes;
029127:             try { nodes = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(selector)); } catch (err) { return false; }
029128:             return nodes.some(el => {
029129:                 if (!el || el.closest(`#${SCRIPT.controlId}`) || el.closest(`#${SCRIPT.panelId}`)) return false;
029130:                 if (!isVisible(el)) return false;
029131:                 const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
029132:                 return (rect.width * rect.height) > 1200;
029133:             });
029134:         });
029135:     }
029136: 
029137:     function refreshSuppression() {
029138:         const control = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.controlId);
029139:         if (!control) return;
029140:         control.classList.toggle('mcms-hidden-by-menu', shouldSuppressControl());
029141:     }
029142: 
029143:     function fitControlToMap() {
029144:         runtimeClearTimeout(fitTimer);
029145:         fitTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
029146:             const panel = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.panelId);
029147:             const mapEl = getLargestLeafletMap();
029148:             if (!mapEl) {
029149:                 if (!isTouchLayoutActive()) {
029150:                     observeDesktopPanelWorkspace(null);
029151:                     applyDesktopPanelSizing(panel, null);
029152:                 }
029153:                 return;
029154:             }
029155:             if (mobileModeActive) {
029156:                 clearDesktopPanelSizing(panel);
029157:                 applyMobileDockLayout(mapEl);
029158:             } else if (tabletModeActive) {
029159:                 clearDesktopPanelSizing(panel);
029160:                 applyTabletDockLayout(mapEl);
029161:             } else {
029162:                 clearTabletDockSizing();
029163:                 observeDesktopPanelWorkspace(mapEl);
029164:                 applyDesktopPanelSizing(panel, mapEl);
029165:             }
029166:             if (!panel) return;
029167:             const rect = mapEl.getBoundingClientRect();
029168:             panel.classList.toggle('mcms-map-small', rect.height < 560 || rect.width < 650);
029169:         }, 60);
029170:     }
029171:

029174:         if (!panel) return;
029175:         if (isTouchLayoutActive()) { applyTabletPanelPosition(); return; }
029176:         clearTabletPanelSizing(panel);

029095:     function runAutoNight(force = false) {
029096:         if (!state.autoNight.enabled) return;
029097:         const bucket = isNightNow(state.autoNight.nightStart, state.autoNight.dayStart) ? 'night' : 'day';
029098:         if (!force && state.autoNight.lastBucket === bucket) return;
029099:         state.autoNight.lastBucket = bucket;
029100:         state.theme = bucket === 'night' ? normaliseTheme(state.autoNight.nightTheme) : normaliseTheme(state.autoNight.dayTheme);
029101:         saveState();
029102:         applyRootAttributes();
029103:         updateUI();
029104:     }
029105: 
029106:     function isNightNow(start, end) {
029107:         const now = new Date();
029108:         const current = now.getHours() * 60 + now.getMinutes();
029109:         const startMin = parseTime(start, 19 * 60);
029110:         const endMin = parseTime(end, 7 * 60);
029111:         if (startMin === endMin) return false;
029112:         if (startMin < endMin) return current >= startMin && current < endMin;
029113:         return current >= startMin || current < endMin;
029114:     }
029115: 
029116:     function parseTime(value, fallback) {
029117:         const match = String(value || '').match(/^(\d{1,2}):(\d{2})$/);
029118:         if (!match) return fallback;
029119:         return clamp(match[1], 0, 23, Math.floor(fallback / 60)) * 60 + clamp(match[2], 0, 59, fallback % 60);
029120:     }

029123:         if (state.cleanMode) return false;

029125:         return SUPPRESSION_SELECTORS.some(selector => {
029126:             let nodes;

029130:                 if (!isVisible(el)) return false;

029132:                 return (rect.width * rect.height) > 1200;
029133:             });
029134:         });
029135:     }

029150:                     observeDesktopPanelWorkspace(null);
029151:                     applyDesktopPanelSizing(panel, null);
029152:                 }
029153:                 return;
029154:             }

029156:                 clearDesktopPanelSizing(panel);
029157:                 applyMobileDockLayout(mapEl);
029158:             } else if (tabletModeActive) {
029159:                 clearDesktopPanelSizing(panel);
029160:                 applyTabletDockLayout(mapEl);

029172:     function setPanelCssPosition(left, top) {
029173:         const panel = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.panelId);
029174:         if (!panel) return;
029175:         if (isTouchLayoutActive()) { applyTabletPanelPosition(); return; }
029176:         clearTabletPanelSizing(panel);
029177:         panel.style.setProperty('position', 'fixed', 'important');
029178:         panel.style.setProperty('left', `${Math.round(left)}px`, 'important');
029179:         panel.style.setProperty('top', `${Math.round(top)}px`, 'important');
029180:         panel.style.setProperty('right', 'auto', 'important');
029181:         panel.style.setProperty('bottom', 'auto', 'important');
029182:         panel.style.setProperty('transform', 'none', 'important');
029183:     }
029184: 
029185:     function clampPanelPosition(left, top) {
029186:         const panel = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.panelId);
029187:         if (!panel) return { left: 12, top: 12 };
029188:         const mapEl = getLargestLeafletMap();
029189:         const bounds = applyDesktopPanelSizing(panel, mapEl) || resolveDesktopPanelBounds(null);
029190:         const panelWidth = Math.min(panel.offsetWidth || 318, Math.max(1, bounds.right - bounds.left));
029191:         const panelHeight = Math.min(panel.offsetHeight || 500, bounds.maxHeight);
029192:         return clampDesktopPanelPoint(left, top, panelWidth, panelHeight, bounds);
029193:     }
029194: 
029195:     function getDefaultPanelPosition() {
029196:         const control = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.controlId);
029197:         const panel = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.panelId);
029198:         const margin = 12;
029199:         if (!control || !panel) return { left: margin, top: margin };
029200:         const controlRect = control.getBoundingClientRect();
029201:         const panelWidth = panel.offsetWidth || 318;
029202:         const viewportWidth = pageWindow.innerWidth || document.documentElement.clientWidth;
029203:         const spaceRight = viewportWidth - controlRect.right - margin;
029204:         const spaceLeft = controlRect.left - margin;
029205:         return {
029206:             left: (spaceRight >= panelWidth || spaceRight >= spaceLeft) ? controlRect.right + margin : controlRect.left - panelWidth - margin,
--- source lines 30960-31134, match 31015 ---
030960:             saveState();
030961:             button.disabled = true;
030962:             button.textContent = 'Reloading…';
030963:             runtimeSetTimeout(() => location.reload(), 120);
030964:         }, true);
030965:         runtimeOnCleanup(() => {
030966:             document.getElementById(ALLIANCE_BUILDINGS_MAP_NOTICE_ID)?.remove();
030967:             document.querySelectorAll('.mcms-alliance-buildings-map-column').forEach(element => element.classList.remove('mcms-alliance-buildings-map-column'));
030968:             document.querySelectorAll('.mcms-alliance-buildings-list-column').forEach(element => element.classList.remove('mcms-alliance-buildings-list-column'));

030971:                 element.removeAttribute('data-mcms-alliance-list-column');
030972:             });

030974:         });

030976:     }
