030978: 
030979:     function connectMainMutationObserver() {
030980:         if (!mainMutationObserver || runtime.destroyed || !document.body) return;
030981:         try { mainMutationObserver.disconnect(); } catch (err) {}
030982:         const roots = new Set();
030983:         const mapElement = getLargestLeafletMap();
030984:         const mapRoot = mapElement?.closest?.('#map_outer') || mapElement?.parentElement || mapElement;
030985:         const missionRoot = document.querySelector('#missions, #mission_list, .missions-panel, .mission-list');
030986:         if (mapRoot?.isConnected) roots.add(mapRoot);
030987:         if (missionRoot?.isConnected) roots.add(missionRoot);
030988:         if (!roots.size) {
030989:             mainMutationObserverFallbackActive = true;
030990:             mainMutationObserver.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });
030991:             return;
030992:         }
030993:         mainMutationObserverFallbackActive = false;
030994:         for (const root of roots) mainMutationObserver.observe(root, { childList: true, subtree: true });
030995:         mainMutationObserver.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: false });
030996:     }
030997: 
030998:     async function runDeferredOperationalStartup() {
030999:         if (operationalStartupStarted || runtime.destroyed) return;
031000:         const operationalPerformanceStartedAt = startupClock();
031001:         if (document.hidden) {
031002:             runtimeSetTimeout(() => scheduleDeferredOperationalStartup(0), 1000);
031003:             return;
031004:         }
031005:         operationalStartupStarted = true;
031006:         loadCachedFinancialRules();
031007:         loadCachedFinancialPolicy();
031008:         ensureFinanceVaultCredential(financePlayerIdentity());
031009:         scanInlineMissionMarkerData();
031010:         installMissionMarkerAddHook();
031011:         installRadioMessageHook();
031012:         if (state.missionValue) installMissionValueWindows();
031013:         startupDataPassActive = true;
031014:         try {
031015:             if (vehicleDataNeeded()) await refreshPersonalVehicleData(true);
031016:         } finally {
031017:             startupDataPassActive = false;
031018:         }
031019:         runtimeClearTimeout(missionSnapshotTimer);
031020:         missionSnapshotTimer = null;
031021:         if (missionSnapshotsNeeded()) refreshMissionSnapshots();
031022:         if (state.missionSpawn.enabled) primeMissionSpawnDetector();
031023:         if (state.stuckDetector.enabled) scheduleStuckMissionRefresh(180);
031024:         if (state.transportWatcher) scheduleTransportWatcherRefresh(220);
031025:         if (state.resourceGap.enabled) scheduleResourceGapRefresh(260);
031026:         if (state.unitCommitment) scheduleUnitCommitmentRefresh(300);
031027:         if (state.allianceCredits) scheduleAllianceCreditRefresh(320);
031028:         if (state.missionAge) scheduleMissionAgeRefresh(340);
031029:         operationalStartupComplete = true;
031030:         scheduleOperationalPanelsRender(0);
031031:         if (state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled) scheduleMajorIncidentFeedRender(120);
031032:         scheduleEnabledMapRefreshes({ includeSnapshots: false, positionPanel: false, mapOnly: true });
031033:         recordStartupMetric('operationalStartupMs', operationalPerformanceStartedAt, { operationalStartupComplete: true });
031034: 
031035:     }
031036: 
031037:     function scheduleDeferredOperationalStartup(delay = STARTUP_OPERATIONAL_DELAY_MS) {
031038:         if (operationalStartupStarted || runtime.destroyed) return;
031039:         runtimeSetTimeout(() => runtimeRunWhenIdle(() => {
031040:             runDeferredOperationalStartup().catch(err => {
031041:                 operationalStartupComplete = true;
031042:                 startupDataPassActive = false;
031043:                 console.debug(`[${SCRIPT.name}] Deferred startup recovered after an operational initialisation error.`, err);
031044:                 connectMainMutationObserver();
031045:             });
031046:         }, STARTUP_IDLE_TIMEOUT_MS), Math.max(0, Number(delay) || 0));
031047:     }
031048: 
031049: 
031050:     const AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_SELECTOR = 'a.missing_vehicles_load[href*="/missing_vehicles"]';
031051:     const AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_MISSION_ROOT_SELECTOR = '#lightbox_box, #lightbox, .lightbox_content, .modal.show, .modal.in, .modal-content, [role="dialog"], .ui-dialog-content, .ui-dialog';
031052:     const AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_MAX_REQUESTS = 50;
031053:     const AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_SETTLE_MS = 180;
031054:     const AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_TIMEOUT_MS = 6000;
031055:     const AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_HIDDEN_RETRIES = 24;
031056:     let autoLoadAllVehiclesObserver = null;
031057:     let autoLoadAllVehiclesLinkObserver = null;
031058:     let autoLoadAllVehiclesRootObserver = null;
031059:     let autoLoadAllVehiclesScanTimer = null;
031060:     let autoLoadAllVehiclesReleaseTimer = null;
031061:     let autoLoadAllVehiclesMissionId = null;
031062:     let autoLoadAllVehiclesMissionRoot = null;
031063:     let autoLoadAllVehiclesActiveLink = null;
031064:     let autoLoadAllVehiclesActiveSignature = '';
031065:     let autoLoadAllVehiclesInFlight = false;
031066:     let autoLoadAllVehiclesRequestCount = 0;
031067:     let autoLoadAllVehiclesHiddenRetryCount = 0;
031068:     const autoLoadAllVehiclesRequestedPages = new Set();
031069: 
031070:     function autoLoadAllVehiclesLinkInfo(link) {
031071:         if (!link || link.nodeType !== 1 || !link.matches?.(AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_SELECTOR)) return null;
031072:         let url;
031073:         try { url = new URL(link.getAttribute('href') || link.href, location.href); } catch (err) { return null; }
031074:         if (url.origin !== location.origin) return null;
031075:         const match = url.pathname.match(/^\/missions\/(\d+)\/missing_vehicles\/?$/u);
031076:         if (!match) return null;
031077:         const rawOffset = url.searchParams.get('offset_page');
031078:         const offsetPage = Number.isFinite(Number(rawOffset)) ? Math.max(0, Number(rawOffset)) : 0;
031079:         return {
031080:             missionId: match[1],
031081:             offsetPage,
031082:             signature: `${match[1]}:${offsetPage}:${url.pathname}${url.search}`,
031083:             href: url.href
031084:         };
031085:     }
031086: 
031087:     function autoLoadAllVehiclesElementVisible(element) {
031088:         if (!element?.isConnected || element.hidden || element.getAttribute?.('aria-hidden') === 'true') return false;
031089:         if (element.matches?.(':disabled, .disabled, [aria-disabled="true"]')) return false;
031090:         try {
031091:             const style = pageWindow.getComputedStyle?.(element);
031092:             if (style?.display === 'none' || style?.visibility === 'hidden' || style?.visibility === 'collapse' || style?.pointerEvents === 'none' || Number(style?.opacity) === 0) return false;
031093:             const rect = element.getBoundingClientRect?.();
031094:             return !rect || (rect.width > 1 && rect.height > 1);
031095:         } catch (err) {
031096:             return true;
031097:         }
031098:     }
031099: 
031100:     function autoLoadAllVehiclesResolveMissionRoot(link) {
031101:         return link.closest?.(AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_MISSION_ROOT_SELECTOR) || link.parentElement || document.body;
031102:     }
031103: 
031104:     function autoLoadAllVehiclesCandidateLinks() {
031105:         if (!state.autoLoadAllVehicles) return [];
031106:         const queryRoot = autoLoadAllVehiclesMissionRoot?.isConnected && autoLoadAllVehiclesElementVisible(autoLoadAllVehiclesMissionRoot)
031107:             ? autoLoadAllVehiclesMissionRoot
031108:             : document;
031109:         return Array.from(queryRoot.querySelectorAll(AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_SELECTOR))
031110:             .reverse()
031111:             .map(link => ({ link, info: autoLoadAllVehiclesLinkInfo(link) }))
031112:             .filter(candidate => Boolean(candidate.info));
031113:     }
031114: 
031115:     function clearAutoLoadAllVehiclesReleaseTimer() {
031116:         runtimeClearTimeout(autoLoadAllVehiclesReleaseTimer);
031117:         autoLoadAllVehiclesReleaseTimer = null;
031118:     }
031119: 
031120:     function disconnectAutoLoadAllVehiclesLinkObserver() {
031121:         runtimeUntrackObserver(autoLoadAllVehiclesLinkObserver);
031122:         autoLoadAllVehiclesLinkObserver = null;
031123:     }

031126:         runtimeUntrackObserver(autoLoadAllVehiclesRootObserver);
031127:         autoLoadAllVehiclesRootObserver = null;
031128:     }

031133:         autoLoadAllVehiclesInFlight = false;

031501:                     const progress = criticalMissionClearingProgress(snapshot);

031505:                         break;
031506:                     }
031507:                 }

031513:                     renderOperationalPanels(true, { updateViewTime: false, preserveScroll: true });
031514:                 });
031515:             }
031516:         }, {
031517:             economyIntervalMs: 60 * 1000,

031519:         });

031521:             if (document.getElementById(SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId)?.classList.contains('mcms-open')) refreshCriticalClearingCountdowns();
031522:         }, {
031523:             intervalResolver: () => document.getElementById(SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId)?.classList.contains('mcms-open') ? 1000 : 60 * 1000,

031526:         });

001397:     function normaliseLoadedState(parsed, base = defaultState()) {
001398:         const merged = {
001399:         ...base,
001400:         ...parsed,
001401:         nudge: { ...base.nudge, ...(parsed.nudge || {}) },
001402:         visibility: { ...base.visibility, ...(parsed.visibility || {}) },
001403:         quickPins: { ...base.quickPins, ...(parsed.quickPins || {}) },
001404:         coverage: { ...base.coverage, ...(parsed.coverage || {}) },
001405:         heatmap: { ...base.heatmap, ...(parsed.heatmap || {}) },
001406:         stuckDetector: { ...base.stuckDetector, ...(parsed.stuckDetector || {}) },

015483:     function clearAllianceCreditLabels() {
015484:         if (allianceCreditGroup) {
015485:         try { allianceCreditGroup.clearLayers(); allianceCreditGroup.remove(); } catch (err) {}
015486:         }
015487:         allianceCreditLabels.clear();
015488:         allianceCreditGroup = null;
015489:     }
015490: 
015491:     function missionVehicleStateFromObject(source) {
015492:         if (!source || typeof source !== 'object') return null;
015493:         const containers = [source, source.options, source.params, source.mission, source.data, source.missionData, source._missionData]
015494:         .filter(item => item && typeof item === 'object');
015495: 
015496:         for (const item of containers) {
015497:         const value = Number(item.vehicle_state ?? item.vehicleState);
015498:         if (Number.isFinite(value)) return value;
015499:         }
015500:         return null;
015501:     }
015502: 
015503:     function vehicleAssignedMissionId(vehicle) {
015504:         if (!vehicle || typeof vehicle !== 'object') return null;
015505:         const containers = [vehicle, vehicle.options, vehicle.params, vehicle.vehicle, vehicle.data, vehicle.vehicleData, vehicle._vehicleData]
015506:         .filter(item => item && typeof item === 'object');
015507:         const keys = ['mission_id', 'missionId', 'target_mission_id', 'targetMissionId'];
015508: 
015509:         for (const item of containers) {
015510:         const targetType = String(item.target_type ?? item.targetType ?? '').toLowerCase();
015511:         if (targetType === 'mission') {
015512:             const targetMissionId = normaliseMissionId(item.target_id ?? item.targetId);
015513:             if (targetMissionId !== null && targetMissionId !== '0') return targetMissionId;
015514:         }
015515:         for (const key of keys) {
015516:             const missionId = normaliseMissionId(item[key]);
015517:             if (missionId !== null && missionId !== '0') return missionId;
015518:         }
015519:         }
015520:         return null;
015521:     }
015522: 
015523:     function vehicleOwnerId(vehicle) {
015524:         if (!vehicle || typeof vehicle !== 'object') return null;
015525:         const containers = [vehicle, vehicle.options, vehicle.params, vehicle.vehicle, vehicle.data, vehicle.vehicleData, vehicle._vehicleData]
015526:         .filter(item => item && typeof item === 'object');
015527: 
015528:         for (const item of containers) {
015529:         const value = item.user_id ?? item.userId ?? item.owner_id ?? item.ownerId;
015530:         if (value !== undefined && value !== null && value !== '') return String(value);
015531:         }
015532:         return null;
015533:     }
015534: 
015535:     function vehicleRecordId(vehicle) {
015536:         if (!vehicle || typeof vehicle !== 'object') return null;
015537:         const containers = [vehicle, vehicle.options, vehicle.params, vehicle.vehicle, vehicle.data, vehicle.vehicleData, vehicle._vehicleData]
015538:         .filter(item => item && typeof item === 'object');
015539:         for (const item of containers) {
015540:         const value = item.id ?? item.vehicle_id ?? item.vehicleId;
015541:         if (value !== undefined && value !== null && value !== '') return String(value);
015542:         }
015543:         return null;
015544:     }
015545: 
015546:     function normaliseVehicleApiPayload(payload) {
015547:         if (Array.isArray(payload)) return payload.filter(item => item && typeof item === 'object');
015548:         if (Array.isArray(payload?.result)) return payload.result.filter(item => item && typeof item === 'object');
015549:         if (payload && typeof payload === 'object') return Object.values(payload).filter(item => item && typeof item === 'object');
015550:         return [];
015551:     }
015552: 
015553:     function getPersonalVehicleRecords() {
015554:         const now = Date.now();
015555:         if (
015556:         personalVehicleRecordsCache.vehicleRevision === vehicleDataRevision &&
015557:         personalVehicleRecordsCache.markerRevision === vehicleRegistryRevision &&
015558:         personalVehicleRecordsCache.apiReady === vehicleApiReady &&
015559:         (vehicleApiReady || now - personalVehicleRecordsCache.createdAt <= 1000)
015560:         ) return personalVehicleRecordsCache.records;
015561: 
015562:         let records;
015563:         if (vehicleApiReady) {
015564:         records = Array.from(personalVehicleApiCache.values());
015565:         } else {
015566:         const merged = new Map(personalVehicleApiCache);
015567:         const currentUserId = currentMissionUserId();
015568:         for (const vehicle of getVehicleMarkerLayers()) {
015569:             const ownerId = vehicleOwnerId(vehicle);
015570:             if (currentUserId !== null && ownerId !== null && ownerId !== currentUserId) continue;
015571:             const id = vehicleRecordId(vehicle) || `marker:${vehicle?._leaflet_id ?? merged.size}`;
015572:             if (!merged.has(id)) merged.set(id, vehicle);
015573:         }
015574:         records = Array.from(merged.values());
015575:         }
015576:         personalVehicleRecordsCache = {
015577:         vehicleRevision: vehicleDataRevision,
015578:         markerRevision: vehicleRegistryRevision,
015579:         apiReady: vehicleApiReady,
015580:         createdAt: now,
015581:         records
015582:         };
015583:         return records;
015584:     }
015585: 
015586:     function invalidateMissionCommitmentIndex() {
015587:         missionCommitmentIndexDirty = true;
015588:     }
015589: 
015590:     function rebuildMissionCommitmentIndex() {
015591:         if (!missionCommitmentIndexDirty) return missionCommitmentIndex;
015592: 
015593:         missionCommitmentIndex.clear();
015594:         const seenVehicles = new Set();
015595:         const currentUserId = currentMissionUserId();
015596: 
015597:         for (const vehicle of getPersonalVehicleRecords()) {
015598:         const missionId = vehicleAssignedMissionId(vehicle);
015599:         if (missionId === null) continue;
015600: 
015601:         if (!vehicleApiReady) {
015602:             const ownerId = vehicleOwnerId(vehicle);
015603:             if (currentUserId !== null && ownerId !== null && ownerId !== currentUserId) continue;
015604:         }
015605: 
015606:         const vehicleId = vehicleRecordId(vehicle) || `anon:${seenVehicles.size}`;
015607:         if (seenVehicles.has(vehicleId)) continue;
015608:         seenVehicles.add(vehicleId);
015609: 
015610:         let commitment = missionCommitmentIndex.get(missionId);
015611:         if (!commitment) {
015612:             commitment = {
015613:                 total: 0,
015614:                 active: 0,
015615:                 onScene: 0,
015616:                 onWay: 0,
015617:                 travelling: 0,
015618:                 transporting: 0,
015619:                 awaitingPickup: 0,
015620:                 requestingDispatch: 0,
015621:                 outOfService: 0,
015622:                 available: 0,
015623:                 unknownStatus: 0
015624:             };
015625:             missionCommitmentIndex.set(missionId, commitment);
015626:         }
015627: 
015628:         commitment.total += 1;
015629:         const code = vehicleStatusCode(vehicle);
015630:         if (code === 3) {
015631:             commitment.onWay += 1;
015632:             commitment.travelling += 1;
015633:             commitment.active += 1;
015634:         } else if (code === 4) {
015635:             commitment.onScene += 1;
015636:             commitment.active += 1;
015637:         } else if (code === 7) {
015638:             commitment.transporting += 1;
015639:             commitment.active += 1;
015640:         } else if (code === 9) {
015641:             commitment.awaitingPickup += 1;
015642:             commitment.active += 1;
015643:         } else if (code === 5) commitment.requestingDispatch += 1;
015644:         else if (code === 6) commitment.outOfService += 1;
015645:         else if (code === 1 || code === 2) commitment.available += 1;
015646:         else commitment.unknownStatus += 1;
015647:         }
015648: 
015649:         missionCommitmentIndexDirty = false;
015650:         return missionCommitmentIndex;
015651:     }
015652: 
015653:     function refreshPersonalVehicleData(force = false) {
015654:         const now = Date.now();
===== 'function normaliseVehicleApiPayload': 1 matches =====
--- source lines 15491-15665, match 15546 ---
015491:     function missionVehicleStateFromObject(source) {
015492:         if (!source || typeof source !== 'object') return null;
015493:         const containers = [source, source.options, source.params, source.mission, source.data, source.missionData, source._missionData]
015494:         .filter(item => item && typeof item === 'object');
015495: 
015496:         for (const item of containers) {
015497:         const value = Number(item.vehicle_state ?? item.vehicleState);
015498:         if (Number.isFinite(value)) return value;
015499:         }
015500:         return null;
015501:     }
015502: 
015503:     function vehicleAssignedMissionId(vehicle) {
015504:         if (!vehicle || typeof vehicle !== 'object') return null;
015505:         const containers = [vehicle, vehicle.options, vehicle.params, vehicle.vehicle, vehicle.data, vehicle.vehicleData, vehicle._vehicleData]
015506:         .filter(item => item && typeof item === 'object');
015507:         const keys = ['mission_id', 'missionId', 'target_mission_id', 'targetMissionId'];
015508: 
015509:         for (const item of containers) {
015510:         const targetType = String(item.target_type ?? item.targetType ?? '').toLowerCase();
015511:         if (targetType === 'mission') {
015512:             const targetMissionId = normaliseMissionId(item.target_id ?? item.targetId);
015513:             if (targetMissionId !== null && targetMissionId !== '0') return targetMissionId;
015514:         }
015515:         for (const key of keys) {
015516:             const missionId = normaliseMissionId(item[key]);
015517:             if (missionId !== null && missionId !== '0') return missionId;
015518:         }
015519:         }
015520:         return null;
015521:     }
015522: 
015523:     function vehicleOwnerId(vehicle) {
015524:         if (!vehicle || typeof vehicle !== 'object') return null;
015525:         const containers = [vehicle, vehicle.options, vehicle.params, vehicle.vehicle, vehicle.data, vehicle.vehicleData, vehicle._vehicleData]
015526:         .filter(item => item && typeof item === 'object');
015527: 
015528:         for (const item of containers) {
015529:         const value = item.user_id ?? item.userId ?? item.owner_id ?? item.ownerId;
015530:         if (value !== undefined && value !== null && value !== '') return String(value);
015531:         }
015532:         return null;
015533:     }
015534: 
015535:     function vehicleRecordId(vehicle) {
015536:         if (!vehicle || typeof vehicle !== 'object') return null;
015537:         const containers = [vehicle, vehicle.options, vehicle.params, vehicle.vehicle, vehicle.data, vehicle.vehicleData, vehicle._vehicleData]
015538:         .filter(item => item && typeof item === 'object');
015539:         for (const item of containers) {
015540:         const value = item.id ?? item.vehicle_id ?? item.vehicleId;
015541:         if (value !== undefined && value !== null && value !== '') return String(value);
015542:         }
015543:         return null;
015544:     }
015545: 
015546:     function normaliseVehicleApiPayload(payload) {
015547:         if (Array.isArray(payload)) return payload.filter(item => item && typeof item === 'object');
015548:         if (Array.isArray(payload?.result)) return payload.result.filter(item => item && typeof item === 'object');
015549:         if (payload && typeof payload === 'object') return Object.values(payload).filter(item => item && typeof item === 'object');
015550:         return [];
015551:     }
015552: 
015553:     function getPersonalVehicleRecords() {
015554:         const now = Date.now();
015555:         if (
015556:         personalVehicleRecordsCache.vehicleRevision === vehicleDataRevision &&
015557:         personalVehicleRecordsCache.markerRevision === vehicleRegistryRevision &&
015558:         personalVehicleRecordsCache.apiReady === vehicleApiReady &&
015559:         (vehicleApiReady || now - personalVehicleRecordsCache.createdAt <= 1000)
015560:         ) return personalVehicleRecordsCache.records;
015561: 
015562:         let records;
015563:         if (vehicleApiReady) {
015564:         records = Array.from(personalVehicleApiCache.values());
015565:         } else {
015566:         const merged = new Map(personalVehicleApiCache);
015567:         const currentUserId = currentMissionUserId();
015568:         for (const vehicle of getVehicleMarkerLayers()) {
015569:             const ownerId = vehicleOwnerId(vehicle);
015570:             if (currentUserId !== null && ownerId !== null && ownerId !== currentUserId) continue;
015571:             const id = vehicleRecordId(vehicle) || `marker:${vehicle?._leaflet_id ?? merged.size}`;
015572:             if (!merged.has(id)) merged.set(id, vehicle);
015573:         }
015574:         records = Array.from(merged.values());
015575:         }
015576:         personalVehicleRecordsCache = {
015577:         vehicleRevision: vehicleDataRevision,
015578:         markerRevision: vehicleRegistryRevision,
015579:         apiReady: vehicleApiReady,
015580:         createdAt: now,
015581:         records
015582:         };
015583:         return records;
015584:     }

015590:     function rebuildMissionCommitmentIndex() {
015591:         if (!missionCommitmentIndexDirty) return missionCommitmentIndex;
015592: 
015593:         missionCommitmentIndex.clear();
015594:         const seenVehicles = new Set();
015595:         const currentUserId = currentMissionUserId();
015596: 
015597:         for (const vehicle of getPersonalVehicleRecords()) {
015598:         const missionId = vehicleAssignedMissionId(vehicle);
015599:         if (missionId === null) continue;
015600: 
015601:         if (!vehicleApiReady) {
015602:             const ownerId = vehicleOwnerId(vehicle);
015603:             if (currentUserId !== null && ownerId !== null && ownerId !== currentUserId) continue;
015604:         }
015605: 
015606:         const vehicleId = vehicleRecordId(vehicle) || `anon:${seenVehicles.size}`;
015607:         if (seenVehicles.has(vehicleId)) continue;
015608:         seenVehicles.add(vehicleId);
015609: 
015610:         let commitment = missionCommitmentIndex.get(missionId);
015611:         if (!commitment) {
015612:             commitment = {
015613:                 total: 0,
015614:                 active: 0,
015615:                 onScene: 0,
015616:                 onWay: 0,
015617:                 travelling: 0,
015618:                 transporting: 0,
015619:                 awaitingPickup: 0,
015620:                 requestingDispatch: 0,
015621:                 outOfService: 0,
015622:                 available: 0,
015623:                 unknownStatus: 0
015624:             };
015625:             missionCommitmentIndex.set(missionId, commitment);
015626:         }
015627: 
015628:         commitment.total += 1;
015629:         const code = vehicleStatusCode(vehicle);
015630:         if (code === 3) {
015631:             commitment.onWay += 1;
015632:             commitment.travelling += 1;
015633:             commitment.active += 1;
015634:         } else if (code === 4) {
015635:             commitment.onScene += 1;
015636:             commitment.active += 1;
015637:         } else if (code === 7) {
015638:             commitment.transporting += 1;
015639:             commitment.active += 1;
015640:         } else if (code === 9) {
015641:             commitment.awaitingPickup += 1;
015642:             commitment.active += 1;
015643:         } else if (code === 5) commitment.requestingDispatch += 1;
015644:         else if (code === 6) commitment.outOfService += 1;
015645:         else if (code === 1 || code === 2) commitment.available += 1;
015646:         else commitment.unknownStatus += 1;
015647:         }
015648: 
015649:         missionCommitmentIndexDirty = false;
015650:         return missionCommitmentIndex;
015651:     }
015652: 
015653:     function refreshPersonalVehicleData(force = false) {
015654:         const now = Date.now();
015655:         if (vehicleApiFetchPromise) return vehicleApiFetchPromise;
015656:         if (!force && vehicleApiLastError && now - vehicleApiLastError < VEHICLE_API_ERROR_BACKOFF_MS) return Promise.resolve(false);
015657:         if (!force && vehicleApiReady && now - vehicleApiLastFetch < VEHICLE_API_MIN_REFRESH_MS) return Promise.resolve(true);
015658: 
015659:         vehicleApiFetchPromise = runtimeFetch(new URL('/api/vehicles', document.baseURI || pageWindow.location.href), {
015660:         credentials: 'same-origin',
015661:         cache: 'no-store',
015662:         headers: { Accept: 'application/json' }
015663:         })
015664:         .then(response => {
015665:             if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`Vehicle API ${response.status}`);

001508:         }

001511:         return merged;

001513: 
001514:     function loadState() {
001515:         const base = defaultState();
001516:         const raw = localStorage.getItem(SCRIPT.storageState) || SCRIPT.oldStorageKeys.map(key => localStorage.getItem(key)).find(Boolean);
001517:         if (!raw) return base;
001518: 
001519:         try {
001520:         return normaliseLoadedState(JSON.parse(raw), base);
001521:         } catch (err) {
001522:         return base;
001523:         }
001524:     }
001525: 
001526:     function saveState() {
001527:         try {
001528:         localStorage.setItem(SCRIPT.storageState, JSON.stringify(state));
001529:         localStorage.setItem(SCRIPT.legacyTheme, state.theme);
001530:         localStorage.setItem(SCRIPT.legacyPosition, state.position);
001531:         } catch (err) {}
001532:     }
001533: 
001534:     function getLegacyTheme() {
001535:         return normaliseTheme(localStorage.getItem(SCRIPT.legacyTheme) || 'default');
001536:     }
001537: 
001538:     function getLegacyPosition() {
001539:         const saved = localStorage.getItem(SCRIPT.legacyPosition);
001540:         return POSITIONS[saved] ? saved : 'bl';
001541:     }
001542: 
001543:     function normaliseUiTheme(key) {
001544:         return UI_THEMES[key] ? key : 'mapCommand';
001545:     }
001546: 
001547:     function applyUiTheme(key, announce = false) {
001548:         const nextTheme = normaliseUiTheme(key);
001549:         const changed = state.uiTheme !== nextTheme;
001550:         const pairedHyrulePayout = nextTheme === 'hyrule' && state.payoutFlash.template !== 'hyruleQuest';
001551:         state.uiTheme = nextTheme;
001552:         if (pairedHyrulePayout) state.payoutFlash.template = 'hyruleQuest';
001553:         saveState();
001554:         updateUI();
001555:         if (announce && changed) {
001556:         showToast(pairedHyrulePayout
001557:             ? 'Hyrule Command interface and Quest Reward payout active'
001558:             : `${UI_THEMES[nextTheme].label} interface active`);
001559:         }
001560:     }
001561: 
001562:     function normaliseTheme(key) {
001563:         if (THEMES[key]) return key;
001564:         if (LEGACY_THEME_MAP[key]) return LEGACY_THEME_MAP[key];
001565:         return 'default';
001566:     }
001567: 
001568:     function payoutTemplateMeta(key = state?.payoutFlash?.template) {
001569:         return PAYOUT_TEMPLATES[key] || PAYOUT_TEMPLATES.gta5;
001570:     }
001571: 
001572:     function buildPayoutTemplateOptions(selected = state?.payoutFlash?.template) {
001573:         return PAYOUT_TEMPLATE_ORDER.map(key => `<option value="${key}"${key === selected ? ' selected' : ''}>${PAYOUT_TEMPLATES[key].label}</option>`).join('');
001574:     }

001627: 
001628:     function formatPayoutTitleForTemplate(title, template = state?.payoutFlash?.template) {
001629:         const clean = String(title || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
001630:         if (!payoutTemplateMeta(template).titleCase) return clean.toUpperCase();
001631:         return clean.toLowerCase().replace(/\b\w/g, char => char.toUpperCase());
001632:     }
001633: 
001634:     function clamp(value, min, max, fallback) {
001635:         const num = Number(value);
001636:         if (!Number.isFinite(num)) return fallback;
001637:         return Math.max(min, Math.min(max, num));
001638:     }
001639: 
001640:     function normalisePayoutFlashDuration(value) {
001641:         const duration = Number(value);
001642:         if (!Number.isFinite(duration)) return 4000;
001643:         const rounded = Math.round(duration / PAYOUT_FLASH_STEP_MS) * PAYOUT_FLASH_STEP_MS;
001644:         return Math.max(PAYOUT_FLASH_MIN_MS, Math.min(PAYOUT_FLASH_MAX_MS, rounded));
001645:     }
===== 'function loadState': 1 matches =====
--- source lines 1459-1633, match 1514 ---
001459:         merged.mobileMode = ['auto', 'on', 'off'].includes(String(merged.mobileMode)) ? String(merged.mobileMode) : 'auto';
001460:         merged.transportWatcher = merged.transportWatcher !== false;
001461:         merged.missionInspector = merged.missionInspector !== false;
001462:         merged.stuckDetector.enabled = merged.stuckDetector.enabled !== false;
001463:         merged.stuckDetector.thresholdMin = Math.round(clamp(merged.stuckDetector.thresholdMin, STUCK_MIN_MINUTES, STUCK_MAX_MINUTES, 20));
001464:         merged.missionSpawn.enabled = merged.missionSpawn.enabled !== false;
001465:         merged.resourceGap.enabled = Boolean(merged.resourceGap.enabled);
001466:         merged.resourceGap.radiusMi = RESOURCE_GAP_RADIUS_OPTIONS.includes(Number(merged.resourceGap.radiusMi)) ? Number(merged.resourceGap.radiusMi) : 25;
001467:         merged.transportSweep.delayMs = TRANSPORT_SWEEP_DELAY_OPTIONS.includes(Number(merged.transportSweep.delayMs)) ? Number(merged.transportSweep.delayMs) : 2000;
001468:         merged.transportSweep.maxPerRun = Math.round(clamp(merged.transportSweep.maxPerRun, 1, TRANSPORT_SWEEP_MAX_REQUESTS, 25));
001469:         merged.payoutFlash.enabled = merged.payoutFlash.enabled !== false;
001470:         merged.payoutFlash.threshold = Math.round(clamp(merged.payoutFlash.threshold, 1000, 1000000000, 10000));
001471:         merged.payoutFlash.durationMs = normalisePayoutFlashDuration(merged.payoutFlash.durationMs);
001472:         merged.payoutFlash.template = PAYOUT_TEMPLATES[merged.payoutFlash.template] ? merged.payoutFlash.template : 'gta5';
001473:         merged.payoutFlash.soundEnabled = Boolean(merged.payoutFlash.soundEnabled);
001474:         merged.payoutFlash.soundVolume = clamp(merged.payoutFlash.soundVolume, 0, 1, 0.35);
001475:         merged.discordReport.webhookName = String(merged.discordReport.webhookName || 'MissionChief Finance').trim().slice(0, 80) || 'MissionChief Finance';
001476:         merged.discordReport.topCategories = [3, 5, 8].includes(Number(merged.discordReport.topCategories)) ? Number(merged.discordReport.topCategories) : 5;
001477:         merged.discordReport.period = ['today', 'yesterday', 'last24', 'last7', 'last30', 'last90', 'last180', 'last365', 'allAvailable', 'session', 'sinceLast', 'custom'].includes(merged.discordReport.period) ? merged.discordReport.period : 'today';
001478:         merged.discordReport.customStart = /^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/u.test(String(merged.discordReport.customStart || '')) ? String(merged.discordReport.customStart) : localIsoDate(new Date(Date.now() - 6 * 86400000));
001479:         merged.discordReport.customEnd = /^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/u.test(String(merged.discordReport.customEnd || '')) ? String(merged.discordReport.customEnd) : localIsoDate();
001480:         merged.discordReport.includeChart = merged.discordReport.includeChart !== false;
001481:         merged.discordReport.includeComparison = merged.discordReport.includeComparison !== false;
001482:         merged.discordReport.reportMode = ['executive', 'fullAudit'].includes(String(merged.discordReport.reportMode)) ? String(merged.discordReport.reportMode) : 'fullAudit';
001483:         merged.discordReport.includeForecast = merged.discordReport.includeForecast !== false;
001484:         merged.discordReport.includeRisk = merged.discordReport.includeRisk !== false;
001485:         merged.financialVault.enabled = merged.financialVault.enabled !== false;
001486:         merged.financialVault.ruleFeedEnabled = merged.financialVault.ruleFeedEnabled !== false;
001487:         merged.financialVault.retentionDays = String(merged.financialVault.retentionDays) === 'all'
001488:         ? 'all'
001489:         : ([90, 180, 365, 730, 1825].includes(Number(merged.financialVault.retentionDays)) ? Number(merged.financialVault.retentionDays) : 'all');
001490:         delete merged.financialVault.autoSync;
001491:         delete merged.financialVault.benchmarkOptIn;
001492:         delete merged.financialVault.gatewayUrl;
001493:         delete merged.discordReport.includeBenchmark;
001494:         merged.autoNight.nightTheme = normaliseTheme(merged.autoNight.nightTheme);
001495:         merged.autoNight.dayTheme = normaliseTheme(merged.autoNight.dayTheme);
001496:         merged.bookmarks = merged.bookmarks.map(item => item ? {
001497:         ...item,
001498:         name: String(item.name || 'Bookmark').trim().slice(0, 80) || 'Bookmark',
001499:         shortLabel: sanitiseBookmarkShortLabel(item.shortLabel || ''),
001500:         pinned: Boolean(item.pinned)
001501:         } : null);
001502:         merged.profiles = merged.profiles.map(item => item && typeof item === 'object' ? item : null);
001503: 
001504:         if (!merged.panelPosition || !Number.isFinite(Number(merged.panelPosition.left)) || !Number.isFinite(Number(merged.panelPosition.top))) {
001505:         merged.panelPosition = null;
001506:         } else {
001507:         merged.panelPosition = { left: Number(merged.panelPosition.left), top: Number(merged.panelPosition.top) };
001508:         }
001509: 
001510:         delete merged.requiresAttention;
001511:         return merged;
001512:     }
001513: 
001514:     function loadState() {
001515:         const base = defaultState();
001516:         const raw = localStorage.getItem(SCRIPT.storageState) || SCRIPT.oldStorageKeys.map(key => localStorage.getItem(key)).find(Boolean);
001517:         if (!raw) return base;
001518: 
001519:         try {
001520:         return normaliseLoadedState(JSON.parse(raw), base);
001521:         } catch (err) {
001522:         return base;
001523:         }
001524:     }
001525: 
001526:     function saveState() {
001527:         try {
001528:         localStorage.setItem(SCRIPT.storageState, JSON.stringify(state));
001529:         localStorage.setItem(SCRIPT.legacyTheme, state.theme);
001530:         localStorage.setItem(SCRIPT.legacyPosition, state.position);
001531:         } catch (err) {}
001532:     }
001533: 
001534:     function getLegacyTheme() {
001535:         return normaliseTheme(localStorage.getItem(SCRIPT.legacyTheme) || 'default');
001536:     }
001537: 
001538:     function getLegacyPosition() {
001539:         const saved = localStorage.getItem(SCRIPT.legacyPosition);
001540:         return POSITIONS[saved] ? saved : 'bl';
001541:     }
001542: 
001543:     function normaliseUiTheme(key) {
001544:         return UI_THEMES[key] ? key : 'mapCommand';
001545:     }
001546: 
001547:     function applyUiTheme(key, announce = false) {
001548:         const nextTheme = normaliseUiTheme(key);
001549:         const changed = state.uiTheme !== nextTheme;
001550:         const pairedHyrulePayout = nextTheme === 'hyrule' && state.payoutFlash.template !== 'hyruleQuest';
001551:         state.uiTheme = nextTheme;
001552:         if (pairedHyrulePayout) state.payoutFlash.template = 'hyruleQuest';
001553:         saveState();
001554:         updateUI();
001555:         if (announce && changed) {
001556:         showToast(pairedHyrulePayout
001557:             ? 'Hyrule Command interface and Quest Reward payout active'
001558:             : `${UI_THEMES[nextTheme].label} interface active`);
001559:         }
001560:     }
001561: 
001562:     function normaliseTheme(key) {
001563:         if (THEMES[key]) return key;
001564:         if (LEGACY_THEME_MAP[key]) return LEGACY_THEME_MAP[key];
001565:         return 'default';
001566:     }
001567: 
001568:     function payoutTemplateMeta(key = state?.payoutFlash?.template) {
001569:         return PAYOUT_TEMPLATES[key] || PAYOUT_TEMPLATES.gta5;
001570:     }
001571: 
001572:     function buildPayoutTemplateOptions(selected = state?.payoutFlash?.template) {
001573:         return PAYOUT_TEMPLATE_ORDER.map(key => `<option value="${key}"${key === selected ? ' selected' : ''}>${PAYOUT_TEMPLATES[key].label}</option>`).join('');
001574:     }
001575: 
001576:     function payoutTitleForTemplate(presentation, template = state?.payoutFlash?.template) {
001577:         const tier = presentation?.tier || 'standard';
001578:         const themedTitles = {
001579:         gta5: {
001580:             standard: 'MISSION COMPLETE', major: 'BIG SCORE SECURED', high: 'HEIST PAYDAY', elite: 'LEGENDARY TAKE'
001581:         },
001582:         viceCity: {
001583:             standard: 'Cash Collected', major: 'Miami Money', high: 'Empire Payday', elite: 'King of the City'
001584:         },
001585:         badCompany: {
001586:             standard: 'CONTRACT COMPLETE', major: 'OBJECTIVE SECURED', high: 'PAYDAY EXTRACTED', elite: 'FORTUNE OF WAR'
001587:         },
001588:         scarface: {
001589:             standard: 'CASHOUT COMPLETE', major: 'EMPIRE EXPANDED', high: 'POWER SECURED', elite: 'THE WORLD IS YOURS'
001590:         },
001591:         cyberpunk: {
001592:             standard: 'EDdies TRANSFERRED', major: 'DATA HEIST PAID', high: 'MEGACORP JACKPOT', elite: 'NIGHT CITY LEGEND'
001593:         },
001594:         hellfire: {
001595:             standard: 'BOUNTY CLAIMED', major: 'INFERNAL PAYDAY', high: 'HELLGATE FORTUNE', elite: 'CROWN OF CINDERS'
001596:         },
001597:         wasteland: {
001598:             standard: 'CAPS SECURED', major: 'VAULT RESERVES INCREASED', high: 'WASTELAND FORTUNE FOUND', elite: 'JACKPOT OF THE COMMONWEALTH'
001599:         },
001600:         factorio: {
001601:             standard: 'PRODUCTION TARGET MET', major: 'ASSEMBLY BONUS SECURED', high: 'MEGABASE PAYOUT', elite: 'THE FACTORY MUST GROW'
001602:         },
001603:         galactic: {
001604:             standard: 'CREDITS RECEIVED', major: 'FLEET BONUS CLEARED', high: 'SECTOR TREASURY UNLOCKED', elite: 'GALACTIC FORTUNE'
001605:         },
001606:         darkFantasy: {
001607:             standard: 'Reward Bestowed', major: 'Royal Bounty', high: 'Ancient Treasure Claimed', elite: 'Fortune of the Realm'
001608:         },
001609:         biohazard: {
001610:             standard: 'CONTAINMENT OPERATION COMPLETE', major: 'SECURE TRANSFER RELEASED', high: 'BLACKSITE CREDIT AUTHORIZED', elite: 'OMEGA CLEARANCE AWARD'
001611:         },
001612:         underworld: {
001613:             standard: 'Tribute Collected', major: 'Blood Money Secured', high: 'Dynasty Fortune', elite: 'Sovereign of the Night'
001614:         },
001615:         pixelArcade: {
001616:             standard: 'STAGE CLEAR', major: 'BONUS ROUND', high: 'HIGH SCORE PAYOUT', elite: '1UP JACKPOT'
001617:         },
001618:         jamesBond: {
001619:             standard: 'MISSION ACCOMPLISHED', major: 'CLASSIFIED BONUS SECURED', high: 'DOUBLE-O PAYDAY', elite: 'TOP SECRET JACKPOT'
001620:         },
001621:         hyruleQuest: {
001622:             standard: 'QUEST COMPLETE', major: "HERO'S REWARD", high: 'TREASURE OF HYRULE', elite: 'LEGENDARY RELIC CLAIMED'
001623:         }
001624:         };
001625:         return themedTitles[template]?.[tier] || presentation?.title || '';
001626:     }
001627: 
001628:     function formatPayoutTitleForTemplate(title, template = state?.payoutFlash?.template) {
001629:         const clean = String(title || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
001630:         if (!payoutTemplateMeta(template).titleCase) return clean.toUpperCase();
001631:         return clean.toLowerCase().replace(/\b\w/g, char => char.toUpperCase());
001632:     }
001633:
